programme.desc: Revel in the ethereal beauty of orchids and examine their exotic flowers, which are shaped for one purpose – to attract pollinators. Many use sex as a lure, impersonating a female bee or wasp.

programme.title: Breakthrough: The Ideas That Changed the World: The Airplane
programme.desc: Take to the sky with the dreamers whose work gave humans the ability to fly. From Leonardo da Vinci’s 'flying machines' to the modern commercial plane, without these inventions, we may have never left the ground.

programme.title: Nova: Inside Animal Minds: Who's the Smartest
programme.desc: Many scientists believe the secret lies in relationships. Throughout the animal kingdom, some of the cleverest creatures, including humans, seem to be those who live in complex social groups, like dolphins, elephants and apes.

programme.title: Big Pacific: Violent
programme.desc: Understand how the Pacific, surrounded by the Ring of Fire, is the epicenter of natural mayhem. Violence is part of life in the great ocean, and creatures that live there must choose whether to avoid conflict—or rise to meet it.

programme.title: Shakespeare Uncovered: Richard III With Antony Sher
programme.desc: Sir Antony Sher unveils the life of Shakespeare’s 'Richard III,' comparing the historical king’s reputation with the play’s enduring portrait of ruthless ambition and vengeance.

programme.title: Civilizations: Color and Light
programme.desc: Explore the story of light and color in art - both in the search for greater realism and spiritual ecstasy. Journey from Gothic cathedrals and Indian courtly painting to modern art.

programme.title: Asian Americans: Good Americans
programme.desc: Learn how Asian Americans are simultaneously heralded as a model minority and targeted as the perpetual foreigner during the Cold War. It is also a time of bold ambition, as Asian Americans aspire to national political office.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Waste
programme.desc: The detectives learn that a doctor is impregnating comatose female patients with a wealthy donor's sperm to obtain biologically compatible embryonic stem cells.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Thought Criminal
programme.desc: Under the guidance of Lieutenant Murphy, Sergeant Benson and the SVU take an active approach to catching sex offenders. They target Simon Wilkes, a well-regarded photographer with a secret life.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Girls Disappeared
programme.desc: Benson struggles with her new role as foster mother to baby Noah. Amaro, who is now working the traffic beat in Queens, arrests an underage prostitute with connections to Noah's mother.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Devil's Dissections/ Criminal Pathology
programme.desc: The team is called back to a beach where serial killer Gregory Yates buried his many victims after another victim washes up. Rollins tries to coax Yates into confession, but he reveals a surprising bit of information.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Institutional Fail
programme.desc: A starving toddler is found wandering the streets alone and leads detectives to a house where they find a second child in grave condition. They question the children's caseworker and discover the kids have not been checked in on in months.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Depravity Standard
programme.desc: Benson seeks justice in the trial of child abductor Lewis Hodda, when the plea deal is rejected, Barba must rely on decades-old evidence to make his case.

programme.title: Modern Family: Dance Dance Revelation
programme.desc: It's Luke and Manny's first school dance, and everyone gets in on the fun. Jay and Phil take the boys to the mall, while Claire and Gloria are on the dance committee. Mitch and Cam are horrified to learn that Lily's been biting other children.

programme.title: Modern Family: Slow Down Your Neighbors
programme.desc: Claire hopes to catch and stop a menacing car that speeds though their streets. Phil tries to land an important listing with a difficult client. Jay teaches Manny how to ride a bike. Mitch and Cam have a new, flirty neighbour.

programme.title: Modern Family: Our Children, Ourselves
programme.desc: Claire and Phil want Alex to relax a little with her studies, but then start questioning their own intellectual drives. Gloria tries to befriend another nice couple, and Mitch and Cam run into an old female flame of Mitchell's.

programme.title: Modern Family: Princess Party
programme.desc: The guest list for Lily's princess-themed birthday party gets a little out of hand when Mitchell decides to invite his mom, much to Claire's dismay, and disinvite Fizbo, to Cameron's dismay.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Musical Man
programme.desc: Cameron is relishing his role as interim music director at Luke and Manny's school a little too much. Jay's brother is in town for a visit, and their relentless brotherly ribbing goes a little too far. Phil convinces the family to be in his realty ad.

programme.title: Modern Family: Someone to Watch Over Lily
programme.desc: Mitchell and Cameron look to assign legal guardians for Lily, in case anything happens to them, and secretly assess their family members. What they witness puts doubts in their minds.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Start Digging
programme.desc: When the team finds the body of a widowed, single-mother, they are shocked to discover that the victim was in constant contact with Voight's now-reformed son, Justin.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Silos
programme.desc: Intelligence investigates a gruesome case. Upon further examination, it appears the victim was wearing a CPD issued wire at the time of his death. Meanwhile, Burgess meets her new partner, who came from a terrible assignment.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Made a Wrong Turn
programme.desc: When Burgess and Tay respond to a report of vandalism, they find a badly beaten young man. It appears the young man's fiancée is missing. Meanwhile, Lindsay has a surprise for Halsted, and Fogel berates Platt.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: All Cylinders Firing
programme.desc: When Platt goes to her father Robert's for dinner, she warns him to be careful with his new girlfriend, Natalie. As Platt is leaving her father's place, she is assaulted and rushed to Chicago Med.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Spellbound
programme.desc: When a psychic is found dead in her occult shop, Greg suspects greater forces may be responsible for the woman's demise. However, Grissom steadfastly maintains that science will always crack the case in the end.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Expiration Date
programme.desc: When Callen and Sam are tasked with apprehending a spy contracted by the CIA, Sam is shot and the team enlists the help of Thapa, the elite Nepali soldier from their past, to help to find the shooter, Also, Kensi and Deeks have their first argument.

programme.title: NCIS: Devil's Triangle

programme.desc: As the team tries to track down the terrorists behind the bombing that injured Gibbs, they learn that the group is planning another bombing of 9/11 magnitude and that Gibbs has information about their plan. Meanwhile, Gibbs is visited by his old boss.

programme.desc: Blanche knows she needs a pacemaker, but she fears it'll halt her sex life.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: An Illegitimate Concern
programme.desc: A young man identifies himself as the illegitimate son of Blanche's late husband George.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: 72 Hours
programme.desc: Rose discovers that she may be carrying the HIV virus after learning the blood they used in her gallbladder operation may have contained HIV antibodies.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Twice in a Lifetime

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sisters and Other Strangers
programme.desc: Blanche is dumbfounded to discover that her sister, Charmaine, has written a novel.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Cheaters

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Ed Asner and his son Matt Asner, Remi Adeleke and Chef Jeffrey Saad visit.

programme.title: Movie: Love to the Rescue
programme.desc: An animator learns her daughter has found the love of her life, in a dog. She learns that she has some competition for this new pooch in the form of the PTA President at the school who has promised his son that they will adopt the same dog.

programme.title: Movie: Love's Complicated
programme.desc: Leah thinks all is fine coasting in her relationship with Edward who enrolls her in a conflict-management class. She locks horns with a radio-talk show host but develops new friendships and inner strength.

programme.title: Movie: The Secret Ingredient
programme.desc: A small-town baker is surprised with an invite to compete in a baking show. While there, she runs into her ex-fiancé.

programme.title: The Office: Beach Games

programme.title: The Office: The Job

programme.title: Drunk History: The Roosevelts
programme.desc: Teddy Roosevelt revolutionizes football, Winston Churchill pays FDR a visit at Christmastime, and Eleanor Roosevelt befriends a female Soviet sniper. Rob Riggle, Mae Whitman, Busy Phillips, Rich Fulcher and Louie Anderson make appearances.

programme.title: Drunk History: Drugs
programme.desc: John F. Kennedy's given meth for back pain and Dr. John C. Lilly takes LSD while studying dolphin intelligence.

programme.title: Drunk History: Philadelphia
programme.desc: Baron von Steuben trains the Continental Army, John Adams and Thomas Jefferson battle for presidency, Benedict Arnold commits treason.

programme.title: Drunk History: National Parks
programme.desc: Johnny Muir convinces Teddy Roosevelt to preserve Yosemite. Marjory Stoneman Douglas protects the Everglades. Native Americans occupy Alcatraz.

programme.title: South Park: Pinewood Derby
programme.desc: Randy has a plan that will assure Stan a first place trophy in this year's Pinewood Derby. When they accidentally break warp speed, the town is visited and held hostage by an alien gangster.

programme.title: South Park: Death Camp of Tolerance
programme.desc: The boys are sentenced to the Death Camp of Tolerance where they learn how to treat minorities. Mr Garrison's new boyfriend, Mr. Slave, and the heroic gerbil, Lemmiwinks, make their debut.

programme.title: South Park: With Apologies to Jesse Jackson
programme.desc: Randy Marsh tries to find forgiveness after mistakenly using a racial slur on 'Wheel of Fortune.' Meanwhile, Cartman gets into a rumble with an assembly guest.

programme.desc: Derek encourages a hesitant Meredith to work with him again in neurology. Jackson's mother, Catherine Avery, returns to Seattle Grace with a urology fellow and develops an interest in Richard. Cristina becomes increasingly suspicious of Owen's every move.

programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: The Balancing Act: Stay at Home Tips
programme.desc: Learn how to become a proofreader; how Direct Energy is working to protect your home; tools for achieving your health and fitness goals; optimizing your spending and managing your financial life.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Move Doubt
programme.desc: When the couple next door decides to sell their home, the Heffernans try to persuade Deacon and Kelly to buy it. Doug and Carrie realize something is wrong when the two are completely disinterested in the home. Danny and Spence try to impress a girl.

programme.title: The King of Queens: G'Night Stalker
programme.desc: When Doug starts receiving fan mail from someone who saw his performance at a karaoke club, he lets the attention go to his head, only to have his ego shattered when the emails suddenly stop.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Raygin' Bulls
programme.desc: After a quick shopping spree for some snazzy new clothes, Doug and Ray decide to check out the new nightclub in town. Confident that they still have the moves, they make a small wager to see which one can convince a girl to dance with him first.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Baker's Doesn't
programme.desc: When Doug and Carrie run into Father McDaniel at the movies they feel guilty that they haven't been to church in some time and sign up to help out during the busy holiday season. Meanwhile, Arthur and Spence try to write a Christmas carol.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fresh Brood
programme.desc: In order to help convince Carrie it's time for a child, Doug borrows the baby from Danny so they can give parenting a test run. Doug quickly adjusts to being a dad, but the transition isn't as smooth for Carrie.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Gambling N'Diction
programme.desc: When Doug's mother beats him and the guys in a friendly game of poker, Doug sees an opportunity to capitalize on her poker skills and help him win a high stakes poker tournament.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Apartment Complex
programme.desc: In need of a place to hang out, Doug and the guys decide to rent an apartment above their favourite Chinese restaurant. Meanwhile, in order to keep her new client, Kirstie Alley, happy, Carrie is forced to consume large quantities of food in front of her.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Buggie Nights
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie discover their house is infested with bedbugs but Doug doesn't want to spend money on an exterminator. Meanwhile, Spence and Danny struggle to decide where they are going on vacation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Knee Jerk
programme.desc: Doug enjoys the extra attention Carrie gives him after he falls down the stairs and injures a knee. He then comes up with a plan for the pampering to continue even after he is healed.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Present Tense
programme.desc: When the Heffernans receive an oil painting of themselves as an anniversary gift from Deacon and Kelly, they dislike the picture so much that they decide to stage a robbery rather than hang the painting in their home.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sold-Y Locks
programme.desc: Doug convinces Carrie to sell her hair to a wigmaker so they can afford to go on a cruise with Deacon and Kelly. Meanwhile, when Arthur sees Carrie's new haircut, he starts thinking that she might not be his biological daughter.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Emotional Rollercoaster
programme.desc: Doug lies to Carrie and tells her that he regrets not accomplishing more in life and that he's going to sign up for the IPS management program. Meanwhile, Deacon, Arthur and Spence have a wonderful time at the amusement park riding 'Goliath.'

programme.title: The King of Queens: Four Play
programme.desc: When Doug realizes he has more in common with Deacon's wife than Deacon, he and Kelley start hanging out together. Meanwhile, Arthur feels betrayed by the coffee shop girl, Gloria, who is having great success by taking Arthur's relationship advice.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Hartford Wailer
programme.desc: Carrie convinces her female co-workers to blow off a company retreat and take advantage of the hotel's spa. However, her plans are put into jeopardy when Doug surprises her and wants to spend the weekend watching the Planet of the Apes series.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fight Schlub
programme.desc: When Doug starts hanging out with Joe, a driver at Priority Plus, his fellow drivers lose all respect for him. Later, Doug discovers that Joe was only acting like his friend to get him alone so that he and his fellow drivers could play a trick on Doug.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Acting Out
programme.desc: When Carries decides to put Arthur in a retirement home, Doug is delighted with the prospect of getting his basement back, so he can turn it into a media room. Meanwhile, Danny and Spence refuse to change bedrooms and a classic standoff begins.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mama Cast
programme.desc: When Carrie asks Doug to find an investment for their tax return, she's shocked when he comes home with his very own ice cream truck. Meanwhile, when Carrie is asked to stand in as a 'mom' at a model home, she starts to warm up to the idea of being a mom.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Affair Trade
programme.desc: Doug panics when he starts receiving sexy phone calls from a woman claiming to have spent a weekend in the Hamptons with him. Meanwhile, Danny attempts to sabotage a potential relationship for Spence when he fears losing his best friend to a woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files: If I Were You
programme.desc: A retired school teacher vanishes, but even though he was missing his bills are paid on time and he continues to correspond with his family.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: A woman is found dead. A man's version of events was at variance with the evidence, so investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to determine if this was a botched robbery, or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Stake-Out
programme.desc: When a banker's wife is kidnapped, officers scour the bank, and records for clues. They soon realize how much evidence can be found around a normal office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife. When the man is questioned by police, he remembers nothing, and is shocked at his own actions. The jury must decide if he is a murderer, or suffering from a sleep disorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: In 1957 the police search for a man who committed several crimes in one night, including murder. Eventually, the case turned cold. Almost fifty years later, with the help of scientific advances, the investigators find their man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: To solve a case of triple homicide, investigators have to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting. With the help of forensics, they are able to bring down a killer who gambled, and lost.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Jean Pool
programme.desc: When new DNA technology becomes available, cold case investigators in Tennessee think they'll finally be able to find out who killed a local college student.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead police immediately focus their attention on her husband. Not until they examine cell phone records and a unique shoe print do they realize the real killer has been a bit too close for comfort the entire time.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Wrong Gun
programme.desc: In Texas, a 17-year-old with a violent past is named the killer in a drug deal gone wrong - but a misidentified bullet could unravel the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: If I Were You
programme.desc: A retired school teacher vanishes, but even though he was missing his bills are paid on time and he continues to correspond with his family.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Did Scott Peterson Murder Laci?
programme.desc: A tale of murder, adultery, courtroom drama, and ultimately the death penalty. The story of Scott and Laci Peterson as told by those who lived it.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Aaron Hernandez: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Aaron Hernandez is a star player for the New England Patriots, and is set up for greatness. But after a body is found riddled with bullets a short distance from his home, forensic evidence soon ties Hernandez to the killing.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Forensic experts and investigators piece together strange clues and microscopic evidence to solve the most puzzling criminal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insulated Evidence
programme.desc: A young college student is found strangled and badly burned. Investigators get a break when a trace evidence expert uncovers the murder weapon in the spool of a vacuum.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Hearted
programme.desc: After a man dies with no proof of foul play, investigators learn that another man died the exact same way six years earlier. The men had one thing in common: at the time of their deaths, they were married to the same woman.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Cowboys and Pirates
programme.desc: On Hawaii's Big Island, Josh enlists the help of Johnathan Hillstrand to help him dive deeper into the mystery of Phil's charts and gain insight into the time Phil spent in Kona Town.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: All-Nighter
programme.desc: Inspired by Phil's love of history, Josh, Casey and Johnathan Hillstrand brave unknown waters in the dead of night to try their hand at the ancient Hawaiian Ika-Shibi fishing technique.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: On Deck: Double Agent
programme.desc: Crawling with facts and bonus scenes: The Cornelia Marie uses US satellites to spy on the Russians, Scott pioneers a dormant fishery and Wild Bill faces off with a Russian greenhorn.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Razor's Edge
programme.desc: Johnathan undergoes surgery at sea. Junior puts his gear and season on a cliff edge in search of the elusive Golden Kings. Summer Bay's greenhorn has Wild Bill seeing red. Josh Harris attempts an accomplishment that eluded his father for decades.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Big New Boat
programme.desc: Mike Rowe reveals exclusive content and breaking news on the Bering Sea. Josh and Casey look to the future of Bloodline, Jake and Sig go head to head and Junior has a big announcement.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Tortured to Greatness
programme.desc: Greenhorns arrive in Dutch Harbor each season looking to pocket thousands for a few week's work. Captains and a clinical psychologist compare different methods for training a new guy for one of the world's most dangerous jobs.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Razor's Edge
programme.desc: Johnathan undergoes surgery at sea. Junior puts his gear and season on a cliff edge in search of the elusive Golden Kings. Summer Bay's greenhorn has Wild Bill seeing red. Josh Harris attempts an accomplishment that eluded his father for decades.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Big New Boat
programme.desc: Mike Rowe reveals exclusive content and breaking news on the Bering Sea. Josh and Casey look to the future of Bloodline, Jake and Sig go head to head and Junior has a big announcement.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Strategy and Deception
programme.desc: With millions on the line, a crab captain must be as strategic as a four star general. But is deception a necessary tactic for a success and survival on the Bering Sea? There's only one way to find out is as master fishermen meet the science of polygraph.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Hell Portal
programme.desc: A strange complex of tunnels on the grounds of a bizarre mansion was under lock-and-key for a century, and since its rediscovery, some believe its mysterious place is a gate to hell. New discoveries reveal its secret purpose and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting of Heartbreak Castle
programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: City of the Damned
programme.desc: A deserted town in Spain with a bloody past and a ghost fleet heading nowhere are homes to dark secrets.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Armageddon Highway
programme.desc: A strange Cuban prison, an eerie escape route built for Armageddon, and an underwater marvel that changed history are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting on Plague Island

programme.title: The First 48: Underworld
programme.desc: In Miami, the homicide team investigate the murder of a man found brutally beaten to death below a major interstate.

programme.title: The First 48: Life Snatched
programme.desc: Detectives investigate the murder of a middle-aged mother of four, shot to death in a random robbery outside a public storage facility.

programme.title: Tirdy Works: The Ultimatum
programme.desc: After her moose video goes viral, Mary focuses full time on making Tirdy Works a viable business. Her partner Deb gives her an ultimatum: make the business profitable by the end of winter or quit.

programme.title: Tirdy Works: The Big Craft Show
programme.desc: Mary, Deb, Tammi, Dale and the rest of the Tirdy Works team heads to a craft show in New Hampshire in search of a market hungry for her art.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: In Poor Taste Buds
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr take to the court to serve up some seriously personal tennis lessons and then head to the park for a bewildering game of Now! The loser must put his face through the ultimate test during a food presentation.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cruisin' for a Bruisin'
programme.desc: The guys hit the seas for a special cruise episode. They turn the pool deck into a playground, give misinformation while posing as entertainment directors, and two Jokers get a double dose of torture in a two-part punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Tirdy Works: What Matters Most
programme.desc: Mary attempts to diversify into other types of tird products, and is invited to present as part of Career Day at Katie's high school.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Tirdy Works: What Matters Most
programme.desc: Mary attempts to diversify into other types of tird products, and is invited to present as part of Career Day at Katie's high school.

programme.title: Tirdy Works: The Big Craft Show

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nutrition
programme.desc: Adam shows why vitamin supplements don't make us any healthier, and that the 'balanced breakfast' we've been sold is anything but. Later, he reveals how most of the nutritional science the media reports on isn't science at all.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Football
programme.desc: Adam hits the gridiron to show why the playoffs rarely determine which team is best, and he explores how sports drink hydration myths are putting kids at risk.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Games
programme.desc: Adam hits pause on the myth that connects video games to real-life violence, and reveals that Monopoly was a rip-off of an anti-capitalist teaching game. Plus, Olympic organizers get rich while athletes struggle to get by.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Cops
programme.desc: Adam looks at the truth behind the overuse of SWAT Teams, illustrates how using school officers can create a pipeline for prisons, and examines the origins and intended purpose of police officers.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Mid-life Chrisley
programme.desc: With Todd's birthday fast approaching, he begins to obsess about his age and reject getting older, but with the help of Mama Faye and her friends, he begins to accept the future.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Failure to Launch
programme.desc: Julie is excited to start her new food blog but when no one 'likes' her page, she and Todd go on a food journey, which takes them from fine French cuisine to foraging for their own food.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Dude Ranch
programme.desc: Grayson decides he wants to be a real city slicker for his 9th birthday, and persuades his entire family to stay overnight at a working dude ranch, where they will test how country the Chrisleys really are.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chrisleys Take London
programme.desc: Chase and Savannah are ecstatic to embark on a family graduation trip to London, much to the chagrin of Todd, a creature of habit who's never left the country.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Lord Chrisley
programme.desc: When Todd takes his family to the English countryside, he insists on turning the Chrisleys into a proper English family but when the family resists, Todd goes to great lengths to prove he's a royal.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Love and Marriage
programme.desc: When Todd and Julie prepare to make a 'day in the life' anniversary video, the cracks in their marriage begin to show and they scramble to reinvent themselves as the 'perfect' couple.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Sports Day
programme.desc: Every summer the Chrisleys attend a family friend's annual sports day BBQ, and every year they are put to shame. Determined to break their losing streak, Todd's competitive spirit pushes his family to their breaking points.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hometown Hero
programme.desc: The Chrisleys head to their South Carolina lake house, which also happens to be in the town where Todd grew up. Todd decides the kids are in need of a family history lesson, but the kids end up turning it around on him.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Graduates
programme.desc: Chase and Savannah have just graduated high school, and a celebration is in the works. As spirits run high, Todd plans on surprising Savannah by inviting her boyfriend Blaire. She has decided to take a break from him, however, threatening Todd's plans.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Crowning Achievements
programme.desc: Disappointed that he missed Savannah being crowned Miss Tennessee Teen USA, Todd plans a party to celebrate. Later, tension builds when it becomes clear the party is more for Todd than Savannah.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Wrath of Todd
programme.desc: When Chase asserts his independence by getting a tattoo of a Bible verse, Todd tries everything in his power to entice Chase to remove it. Meanwhile, Savannah is failing her college Bible class.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Evolution

programme.title: Sex and the City: La Douleur Exquise!
programme.desc: Big tells Carrie that he's going to Paris; Miranda dates a guy who likes public sex.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Games People Play
programme.desc: Carrie meets a 'wrong guy' in her shrink's waiting room; Samantha dates a sports addict.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Sex Buddy
programme.desc: Charlotte double-books dates; Carrie dates her buddy; Samantha hears her neighbours.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Shortcomings
programme.desc: Miranda dates a divorced man and Carrie dates a storywriter's extended family.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Was It Good for You?
programme.desc: Carrie dates an alcoholic and wonders if she's a substitute for beer.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Twenty-Something Girls vs. Thirty-Something Women
programme.desc: Samantha's assistant steals her Rolodex and throws a party; Charlotte dates a 26-year-old.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Ex and the City
programme.desc: Carrie learns that Big is engaged; Charlotte gets reacquainted with an equine friend.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: Samantha hooks-up with a fireman only to have the flames put out; Charlotte dates a bully.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Politically Erect
programme.desc: Charlotte plans to find a husband; Carrie's politician boyfriend has a surprising request.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Attack of the 5'10" Woman
programme.desc: Carrie sees Big's wedding announcement; Charlotte struggles with her body image.

programme.title: House: Acceptance
programme.desc: When a death row inmate mysteriously and suddenly collapses after hallucinating, House takes the case. Dr. Cameron refuses to treat the patient in protest and feels they should treat a cancer patient instead.

programme.title: House: Acceptance
programme.desc: When a death row inmate mysteriously and suddenly collapses after hallucinating, House takes the case. Dr. Cameron refuses to treat the patient in protest and feels they should treat a cancer patient instead.

programme.title: House: Autopsy
programme.desc: A nine-year-old terminal cancer patient is brought in after a hallucinogenic episode. Dr. House and his team struggle to diagnose what caused the hallucination. The patient is forced to decide whether she wants to have a very risky experimental treatment.

programme.title: House: Humpty Dumpty
programme.desc: A handyman falls from a roof and develops strangely darkened pinkies. Despite everything the team tries, the whole hand becomes infected and House is forced to amputate it.

programme.title: House: TB or Not TB
programme.desc: When Dr. Sebastian Charles is rushed to the hospital after collapsing, he determines that all the symptoms are from TB. However, Dr. House has a different opinion and requests additional tests.

programme.title: House: Daddy's Boy
programme.desc: Carnell, a college graduate, collapses at a graduation party from internal shocks and is rushed to the hospital. With his father Ken at his bedside it becomes apparent that the two have not been truthful with each other in their lives.

programme.title: House: Spin
programme.desc: When a famous professional cyclist is brought in after collapsing during a race, House doesn't want to treat him because he thinks he's lying about doing drugs.

programme.title: House: Hunting
programme.desc: Kalvin, a gay man with full-blown AIDS, confronts Dr. House in front of his home, demanding that House figure out what's causing his illness besides HIV or AIDS.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: We’re catching up with NeNe Leakes and finding out what really went down at the reunion.

programme.title: Botched: The Bacon Bra
programme.desc: The doctors help a female bodybuilder who wants to look more feminine, Paul performs surgery on a woman who has large nostril anxiety, and Katella Dash will do anything to look like a human blow-up doll.

programme.title: Botched: Dolly'd Up
programme.desc: A celebrity impersonator wants to fix her saggy skin, Paul helps a woman with a potentially unfixable nose, and Daniella 'two spirits' Mendez wants a convertible implant for both a male and female option.

programme.title: Botched: The Pec Whisperer
programme.desc: 'The Human Doll,' Justin Jedlica, returns to help Dr. Dubrow pump up a 'pec-less' body builder. Also, a former Miss India hopes Dr. Nassif can perfect her pig nose and the Doctors have a heart-to-heart with a woman obsessed with body modification.

programme.title: Botched: Attack of the 3,000cc Implants
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow takes on the biggest breast case of his career, Dr. Nassif tackles a soldier's botched nose and the doctors meet a man whose life goal is to look like a super hero.

programme.title: Chopped: Beach Bites
programme.desc: The competing chefs are told to picture themselves in a lovely coastal town as they prepare a meal of magnificent beach bites for the judges. A variety of seafood and a flotilla of edible boats kick things off in the appetizer basket.

programme.title: Chopped: Smokin' Skills
programme.desc: The chefs are excited to face smoked-food challenges requiring them to make delicious modern dishes with the ancient cooking method. The chefs left standing at the end must make do with a fishy candy in the dessert round.

programme.title: Chopped: Grills On! Game On!
programme.desc: When the ovens and fryers are turned off, four chefs have no choice but to get their grill on! A rare meat hits the heat in round one, and a frozen food favorite in the second basket might not thrill the competitors.

programme.title: Chopped: Beat the Judge: Maneet
programme.desc: Three bold, talented Chopped winners return with purpose and passion to beat judge Maneet Chauhan. Sugary cereal and oddball meatballs make for a tough challenge in round one, and an edible centerpiece is a fun find in the entree basket.

programme.title: Chopped: Lighten Up!
programme.desc: Four chefs who specialize in cooking lighter, healthier fare are challenged to make delicious, lean dishes in the Chopped kitchen. Low-calorie chips and some leafy greens inspire creativity in the first round.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Meat Me in the Parking Lot
programme.desc: Alex takes over the parking lot at Bristol Farms in Calabasas, California. It's a real steak out as the chefs are on the hunt for meat & potatoes before embarking on a trip around the globe - er, parking lot.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Parking Lot Picnic
programme.desc: One chef must turn savory into sweet for their breakfast dish. Then it's a picnic in a parking lot before the chefs are asked to bring the heat to hit the jackpot.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cleaning Out The Fridge
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cleaning out her fridge and using up food that's on its way out. She's turning milk and cream into a wonderful lemon rice pudding with leftover lemons, while the produce drawer is transformed into a cool, delicious fridge gazpacho.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Feeding 101
programme.desc: Ree cooks up three comforting make-ahead meals, including chicken cordon bleu casserole, and tex-mex tamale pie with a spicy beef filling.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Dinner's All Done
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's driving to town, but dinner's all ready to go when she gets home! There's a great Shepherd's Pie made from a hearty Beef Stew with Beer and Paprika, covered in a thick layer of Horseradish Mashed Potatoes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16-Minute Meals: Summer
programme.desc: Ree cooks up four sensational, summery 16-minute meals.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Other Cuts Of Beef
programme.desc: Ree's transforming random cuts of beef into four delicious dishes. She's turning stew beef into slow cooker Sunday stew and serving it with fabulous buttery parsley lemon noodles.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Staying Home 5
programme.desc: Ree shares some great fast recipes at home on the ranch while the kids shoot the show, and her youngest, Todd, joins the crew. Ree makes an easy mashup of broccoli cheddar orzotto and super-speedy Italian meatball skewers.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Perfect Picnic
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is throwing a prairie picnic for her friends.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Spice Masters

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Class Reunion: Food Network Star
programme.desc: Four chefs from Guy Fieri's winning season of Food Network Star reunite in Flavortown 10 years later. First, the Star alums must create a five-star dish using a very special list of ingredients compiled by Guy.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Food Network Star Duos

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: American Heroes

programme.desc: A year after their big move, Flare's feelings for his home with Sarena have changed.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Sport-Centric Lifestyle
programme.desc: After eleven years, Colin and Aline's busy family are over taking their 2200 square foot home. Initially, there were many things they loved about the house, but now their children have grown and it is time to find a larger home.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: A Neglected Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are in Anaheim, California looking at a home being sold all cash with no inspections.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: A Risky Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina spot a listing that seems too good to be true, and as is often the case, the house doesn't exactly match the potential it had in the listing.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Cracked Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a newer home that has seen better days but has great potential.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: A Dinky Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a small and outdated property in Downey, California, that has potential to be a fast, cosmetic flip. Tarek believes the reward will outweigh the risk, but as renovations begin, problems and disagreements arise.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Failing to Plan Is Planning to Fail
programme.desc: Lidia and Fernando are putting all their savings on the line to flip their first home in Rancho Cucamonga. She's a dreamer obsessed with expensive design. He is so neurotic about losing money, he's trying to skimp everywhere he can.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Dancing With Disaster
programme.desc: Patricia and Legacy are professional dancers turned house flippers and a high-end project in Brentwood has them seeing dollar signs. Their hideously expensive loan and a major foundation problem threaten to ruin this flip from the start.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: A Horrible Hoarder House
programme.desc: Alison and Mondo are amateur flippers who have not only taken on the worst house on the block, but the worst house Tarek has ever seen.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Shared Driveways and Slim Margins
programme.desc: A couple wants to quit their day jobs in hopes of earning a massive return on a dilapidated Los Angeles Craftsman. A shared driveway and stress from a hard-money loan complicate the flip, and the couple calls on Tarek El Moussa to get it back on track.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: That New Flipper Smell
programme.desc: A 19 year old ignores his family's pleas to go to college to start his real estate investment career. An investor agreed to let him take lead on a flip, and Tarek must coach him to be fearless when facing an $80,000 renovation.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Fighting All the Way to the Bank
programme.desc: Contractor and real estate agent brothers should be the perfect flipping team, but their business has been a flop due to opposing priorities. They have no plans for their latest project, so Tarek steps in to guide the tempestuous duo over the finish line.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Broken Slab to Totally Fab
programme.desc: A couple is tired of mediocre profits and asks Tarek to help with their next flip in Anaheim, CA. Even with his guidance, they struggle to make the right decisions and face an uphill battle when the local market starts to buck.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: A Flipping Family Nightmare
programme.desc: Junes and his mom share a dream of building a family flipping business, but this flip in Long Beach is quickly becoming a nightmare. Blaming each other for mistakes and losing money, they disagree on who should be doing what.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Mountain Chic
programme.desc: After their house sold quicker than expected, a family is squatting at grandma's place until they can find the perfect mountain-chic family pad. Asbestos cleanup hits the budget hard, forcing Jonathan to finish the reno five days earlier.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: After years of being on the road, Sonja has finally landed a job closer to family in Nashville, and her sister Michelle helps make her house hunt a priority.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Family Above All Else

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Reunion Part Two
programme.desc: Kenya and Porsha discuss where their friendship went wrong, which leads to a spicy exchange between Kenya and Nene. The ladies open up about their past relationship struggles and Eva breaks down while talking about her journey with her daughter.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: It's Just a Scratch
programme.desc: The rumble at Eileen's poker party continues as Kyle and Brandi argue over Kim. Lisa Rinna hosts a jewelry party, where several women call Brandi out for her recent behavior. Kyle receives shocking news about Kim.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Drama Queens
programme.desc: Lisa Vanderpump is surprised when adopted son Max decides he wants to take a DNA test to discover his heritage. Brandi and Kyle both visit Kim, who has just been released from the hospital. Brandi crashes Kyle's gay mixer where things get ugly.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Sister Act
programme.desc: After the blow up at Kyle's gay mixer, the other women speculate about Brandi's influence over Kim. Also, the ladies attend Eileen's movie premiere at a shopping center in the suburbs and Lisa Vanderpump is nervous about her son's genealogy test results.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Surprise!
programme.desc: Eileen organizes a table read for her husband’s latest Hollywood script, inviting the actresses: Kim, Kyle and the two Lisas. Kim and Kyle act like everything is okay between them, but after the read, emotions run high.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Welcome to Amsterdam?
programme.desc: Embarking on a group trip to Amsterdam, several of the ladies attend David Foster's annual charity gala in Canada where Kim confronts Lisa Rinna over talking behind her back. When the women arrive in Amsterdam, anger flares between the Richards sisters.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Amster-Damn!
programme.desc: In Amsterdam, tensions continue to run high between Kim and Lisa Rinna, culminating in a shocking and explosive dinner that leaves Kyle fleeing the scene. Several of the ladies enjoy the local 'space cakes' until Brandi unexpectedly explodes at Kyle.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Amster-damn Slap

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Confessions of a Housewife

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: The Party's Over

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Reunion Part One

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Branch Battle: Army
programme.desc: Bladesmiths from each branch of the US military compete to represent their branch in a battle for $50,000. In round one four members of the Army must forge a special forces V-42 stiletto. The two that move on must build a US Army Officer's Sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Branch Battle: Air Force
programme.desc: In round two, four airmen from the US Air Force attempt to forge a Bolo knife, combining high carbon steel and helicopter parts, using the San Mai technique. The two who move on must forge a weapon that represents their branch: the Air Force NCO Sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Branch Battle: Marines
programme.desc: In round three, four Marines attempt to forge the KA-BAR, having to adapt and overcome metals from a massive anchor, using the San Mai technique. The two who move on must forge a weapon that represents their branch: the Marine Corps Officers Sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Branch Battle: Navy
programme.desc: In round four, four Marines attempt to forge a Naval Mark 3 Dive Knife out of metal from a giant anchor chain. The two who move on must forge a weapon that represents their branch: the Naval Officer's Sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Branch Battle: Finals
programme.desc: In the final round, the winning soldier, airman, marine and sailor return for the ultimate showdown. Two persevere and head home to create a legendary sword: General George Washington's lion-headed Cuttoe.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The War Hammer
programme.desc: Our bladesmiths must choose wisely as they are asked to dumpster dive for the right steel to be turned into a hardened blade of their choosing. After five days at their home forges, the smiths return with hammers in hand.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Knights Templar
programme.desc: Four smiths must use rusty chain mail and steel to forge Knights Templar Crusader daggers. After elimination results in the final two smiths, they must head home to forge the magnificent Knights Templar Crusader sword within five days.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Master and Apprentice
programme.desc: The first ever team challenge is underway, with masters and apprentices taking turns at forging the required blades. One team may be fractured, forcing a teammate to potentially go solo. The final round demands the forging of the Congolese Nzappa zap.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Wind and Fire Wheels
programme.desc: A bicycle presents the first challenge for the smiths, who must use its parts to forge their signature blade. Afterward, the two advancing smiths are challenged to recreate the ancient, intriguing weapon known as wind and fire wheels.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Schiavona
programme.desc: The blade smiths start out on a farm and must harvest their steel from farming tools, then use coal forges to create their signature blades, complete with a lanyard hole. Two final smiths must then use their home forges to create a deadly schiavona sword.

programme.title: Bunk'd: A Whole Lotta Lobsta

programme.title: Raven's Home: School House Trap

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Assignment of the Year
programme.desc: While Antonio continues his off-duty security job for Asher and Layla, Asher is killed. Voight works the case while making sure Antonio is covered and Halstead and Lindsay go undercover in a rather uncomfortable location.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Called in Dead
programme.desc: A friend of Nadia's leads the intelligence unit to a huge heroin bust. Unfortunately, this bust results in Olinksy arriving home to find his wife being held hostage.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Shouldn't Have Been Alone
programme.desc: With Burgess in the hospital after suffering gunshot wounds, the intelligence team is determined to find the people responsible. Lindsay delays her start so she can help with the case and the team takes turns watching over Burgess.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: We Don't Work Together Anymore
programme.desc: Lindsay has her first case with the task force and realizes she needs to call on Voight and her Intelligence Unit to assist. Meanwhile, Burgess is back at work and delegated to desk duty, allowing Platt to partner up with Roman.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Disco Bob
programme.desc: Bob Ruzek is the first to arrive at the scene of a double murder. Intelligence arrives to take over the investigation and tensions rise when Bob must hand over the case to his son and Voight. Lindsay heads off to Bolivia for a case.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Little Devil Complex
programme.desc: Antonio and his sister Gabriela go to the office of Elliot Gish, the man they believe started the fire that killed Shay. Intelligence puts pressure on Gish to confess. Lindsay approaches Voight about returning to Intelligence.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Erin's Mom
programme.desc: Bunny comes to Lindsay concerned about a suspicious repeat customer at her husband's rental company. This lead brings info into a case which robbery-homicide has been working for months. Voight doesn't trust Bunny's motive for the tip.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Do You Do?
programme.desc: Burgess and Roman tackle a dangerous smuggling operation with no means to defend themselves or call for help. Meanwhile, it's a slow day in intelligence and they are spending the day receiving taser certification.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Puts You on That Ledge

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Drive
programme.desc: A former defendant of Deeks is targeted for discovering information that could dismantle a lucrative car shipping operation with links to a global terrorist ring.

programme.title: Snapped: Rebecca Bryan
programme.desc: A suspicious shooting reveals a pretty real estate agent’s scandalous secret life.

programme.title: Snapped: Kalila Taylor
programme.desc: The brutal murder of a homecoming queen shocks a NY town.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: The Smell of Death

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: Hunted to Death

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Behind the Locked Door

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Killer Fetish

programme.title: Snapped: Alice Trappler
programme.desc: A custody battle, a shooting and a suicide on the train tracks all point to one woman.

programme.title: Snapped: Teresa Imel
programme.desc: A brutal slaying and car fire leads police to a family conspiracy.

programme.title: Snapped: Sandy Locklear
programme.desc: The murder of a beloved widower leaves police wondering what secrets his marriage, to his much younger new wife, might be hiding.

programme.title: Snapped: Michelle Paet

programme.title: Snapped: Laura Stelmasek

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Buried Wonders
programme.desc: Archaeologists and NASA have teamed up to use cutting-edge satellite technology in search of the lost pyramids, cities, and treasures that, until now, were undiscovered, as Ancient Egypt's greatest secrets might still be buried beneath the sand.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Buried Wonders
programme.desc: Archaeologists and NASA have teamed up to use cutting-edge satellite technology in search of the lost pyramids, cities, and treasures that, until now, were undiscovered, as Ancient Egypt's greatest secrets might still be buried beneath the sand.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Secrets of the Alien Relic
programme.desc: A strange, alien artifact discovered in the ruins of an ancient Greek shipwreck holds the secrets of a technology thousands of years ahead of its time. Now experts are using cutting-edge science to reveal what this mysterious device was used for.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Cities of Doom
programme.desc: Cutting-edge archaeological investigations at the world's greatest lost cities might finally reveal their hidden secrets. Using the latest hi-tech methods, experts try to explain why these once-proud metropolises were suddenly abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Cities of Doom
programme.desc: Cutting-edge archaeological investigations at the world's greatest lost cities might finally reveal their hidden secrets. Using the latest hi-tech methods, experts try to explain why these once-proud metropolises were suddenly abandoned.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Tomb Raiders from Hell
programme.desc: Experts use cutting-edge technology to investigate clues left behind by the tomb raiders who stole priceless treasures from Egypt's great pyramids. What they discover could reveal how these grave robbers worked and where these relics are today.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of the Maya
programme.desc: Deep in the jungle, the lost city of Tikal holds the dark secrets of the Maya, and now, a new investigation uncovers how it grew into a megacity home to 100,000 people, and why it was mysteriously abandoned.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Tomb Raiders from Hell
programme.desc: Experts use cutting-edge technology to investigate clues left behind by the tomb raiders who stole priceless treasures from Egypt's great pyramids. What they discover could reveal how these grave robbers worked and where these relics are today.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Temples of the Jungle
programme.desc: New technologies reveal the startling truth behind the largest temple ever built, Angkor Wat. Accompany experts as they uncover how this colossal structure was constructed and why one of the largest cities in the world was suddenly abandoned.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Stadium Disaster
programme.desc: A stadium on the brink of collapse, an upside-down bridge, and a massive subway project in crisis are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Leaning Towers of Terror
programme.desc: A city with hundreds of leaning buildings, the world's scariest airport, and the world's biggest sewage pipe are home to engineering disasters in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Ghost Town From Hell
programme.desc: A detonated building mysteriously refuses to fall, an American ghost town with a deadly legacy, and wind turbines on the brink of disaster are engineering disasters in need of repair, and experts reveal what went wrong and if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Houston's Hurricane Hell
programme.desc: When Hurricane Harvey hits Houston, the city is overwhelmed by four feet of rain in four days, causing catastrophic flooding and billions of dollars in damage; experts use cutting-edge tech to discover what went wrong and how it can be fixed.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: A wild child and retired sergeant are stranded in the Belize Jungle following a catastrophic hurricane that threatens their entire challenge. Can they survive in a rainforest that has been turned completely upside down?

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Worlds Collide
programme.desc: Former military man, Chance is paired with an optimistic naturalist, Melissa, in the Amazon Jungle. Humidity, violent storms, caiman, and red-bellied piranha are just some of the threats they face. If they make it to day 21 they're in for a big twist.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Belize Breakdown
programme.desc: On this fan episode of Naked and Afraid, pro surfer Anastasia Ashley, and YouTuber Cory Williams take their shot at surviving Naked and Afraid.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Thieves in the Night
programme.desc: One survivalist falls into a roaring fire after weeks of depleted energy due to no food. With just days to go, the pair makes a daring plan to survive.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Trouble in Paradise
programme.desc: Torrential downpours and brutal wind storms push starving survivalists Riley and Kyle to their breaking points in the Honduran jungle.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Island of Tears
programme.desc: Max and Bianca face off with aggressive caiman, boa constrictors, large spiders, and thorny mangroves in this Superfan challenge on a tropical island in Panama.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Minotaur's Lair
programme.desc: A strange lake in Transylvania is the home of an abandoned village, and a terrifying secret. When an labyrinth is discovered on an island once home to an ancient Greek civilization, experts investigate if it was the legendary home of the Minotaur.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Fleet of Cannibal Bay
programme.desc: See a fleet of sunken ships that point to ghosts, cannibals, and bloodshed in early America; strange Arctic holes that NASA can't explain; and near Area 51, mysterious alien structures straight out of Star Wars.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Phantoms in the Chamber of Secrets
programme.desc: Evidence of a mysterious 5,000-year-old structure suddenly appears in Ireland. A top-secret machine that can see back in time. A satanic pentagram in the snow that points to witchcraft in the New World.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Two to Tangle
programme.desc: These deadly women liked company when they killed.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Broken Ties
programme.desc: These Deadly Women brutally turned on family and in-laws.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Friends Are Foes
programme.desc: Friendships can give us love and support, unless they turn toxic.

programme.title: Body Cam: Knife's Edge
programme.desc: In Ohio a man shoots his ex. She flees and violence erupts when an officer finds him. In Utah police are called to a house where a mother and children have escaped a suspect armed with a machete. In California a therapist is attacked by a former patient.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Maria Spencer's Vow to Kill
programme.desc: A bitter divorce, two arsons and a Pennsylvania father killed execution style; friends say he predicted his own murder.

programme.title: Raw Terror: Murder for Eviction
programme.desc: Ross Reisner was enjoying an evening with his partner Kevin when bullets flew through the window of their Long Island home. Kevin was injured but Ross died in Kevin's arms. The police hunted a former friend of the couple who fled across state lines.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Sick and Twisted
programme.desc: Dana MacKay is found viciously beaten to death while her husband is out of town. One suspect comes to mind: a woman who's been stalking Dana for the last month. But it will take a cellphone with X-rated text messages to unravel this mystery.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Maria Spencer's Vow to Kill
programme.desc: A bitter divorce, two arsons and a Pennsylvania father killed execution style; friends say he predicted his own murder.

programme.title: Raw Terror: Murder for Eviction
programme.desc: Ross Reisner was enjoying an evening with his partner Kevin when bullets flew through the window of their Long Island home. Kevin was injured but Ross died in Kevin's arms. The police hunted a former friend of the couple who fled across state lines.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Dr. Deception
programme.desc: When Jean Claude Dominique is the victim of a hit-and-run, his wife Eliette rushes to his side. It's there she comes face-to-face with his OTHER wife. It's her first glimpse into his double life that leads to her fighting for her own.

programme.title: Body Cam: Knife's Edge
programme.desc: In Ohio a man shoots his ex. She flees and violence erupts when an officer finds him. In Utah police are called to a house where a mother and children have escaped a suspect armed with a machete. In California a therapist is attacked by a former patient.

programme.title: I'd Kill for You: Killing Me Softly
programme.desc: Miami teenager Christin Bilotti is as talented as she is beautiful. Her parents treat her like a princess and are wary when she meets a charming boy, Richard Rojas. But, when the romance gets rocky, darkness, lies and fear spawn a deadly trap.

programme.title: I'd Kill for You: To Have and To Kill
programme.desc: After young lovers Deborah and Steven Brown are married, his erratic and malicious side emerges to torment his wife and their kids for the next 16 years. But trying to escape Steven's wrath proves treacherous for Deborah, and those willing to help.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Wicked Witness
programme.desc: What begins as a frantic 911 call to help an assaulted neighbor ends in the most bizarre investigation the small town of Walsenburg, Colorado has ever seen - complete with a twisted tale of torture, family secrets, and a fallen Jehovah's Witness.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: End of Watch
programme.desc: The town of Cleveland, OK experiences overwhelming heartbreak when its esteemed Sheriff is mysteriously gunned down in the night. As the community wrestles with its safety, law enforcement is determined to find justice for their fellow officer.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Lurking in the Hollers
programme.desc: Family means everything to folks who live in the mountain hollers of Townsend, Tennessee. When one member of the large Griffin clan is found murdered and another goes missing, investigators begin to suspect that a family feud may have taken a deadly turn.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Tragedy Comes in Pairs
programme.desc: Lightning strikes twice in the desert town of Socorro, New Mexico, when Crystal Houston is found murdered just 14 months after her older sister, Stephanie, is killed in a suspicious accident.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Coal Miner's Slaughter
programme.desc: A respected businesswoman in the placid town of Madisonville, KY is found bludgeoned and stabbed to death in her home.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Dangers of Success
programme.desc: As a prominent family awakens to noises in the night, their worst nightmare ensues when their beloved daughter Terri Ann McCoy is fatally shot. Investigators work through leads and lies to discover the perpetrators were closer than they realized.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Who's Missing Now
programme.desc: When beloved young waitress Zilpha Lowery goes missing, foul play is immediately suspected. Rumors of her fate drift through town and tie her to another mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: See No Evil: Run From the Scene
programme.desc: On November 23, 2012, Pennsylvania DJ Ervin Holton is found shot dead on his friend's porch. With no witnesses, investigators spot cameras outside a nearby store Pointing directly at the crime scene.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Boy in Blue
programme.desc: On April 28th, 2010, 12-year-old Alajawan Brown is gunned down outside a 7-Eleven in Skyway, Washington, a block from an earlier shooting. As police question if the two are related, only CCTV can help piece together the puzzle and ID Alajawan's killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Snatched on Camera
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old college student Katie Poirier vanishes while working the graveyard shift at a gas station. It's a family's worst nightmare come true. Grainy security footage reveals an answer... but leaves a community in fear.

programme.title: See No Evil: Maurice's Last Visitor
programme.desc: On December 10th, 2011, Maurice Byrd is found dead in his home with multiple gunshot wounds. Security footage from a neighboring church reveals that prior to his body being discovered, Maurice had many visitors.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Nazi Jihad
programme.desc: As Allied forces close in on Germany, the Nazi dream looks to be over. However, two men will carry Hitler's vision beyond Germany: Otto Skorzeny and Amin Al Husseini. From their Nazi stronghold in the Middle East, these men create a new kind of terror.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mao: China's Chairman of Death
programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals

programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Paws, Present and Future
programme.desc: Two animal lovers with a heart for rescuing dogs and cats call on Chase Morrill and his team to transform their West Gardiner cabin into a pet sanctuary.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Backyard Blowouts
programme.desc: Roger's in Southern California for two unbelievable backyard blowouts. Roger meets Chef Ben Ford in Tarzana.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Light It Up!
programme.desc: Nothing grabs Roger's attention like a raging wood-burning fire. After the flames subside and the smoke clears, there's a spectacular feast that everyone can dive into. Roger heads to Bigmista's Barbecue & Sammich Shop.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Wine Country Cookouts
programme.desc: California's wine country is the perfect place for an outdoor cookout. The weather is gorgeous, the wine is simply divine, and the food is down-right delicious. Roger has been invited to two parties: a pig roast in Paso Robles and a surf and turf grill.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Holy Smokes!
programme.desc: Roger attends the 100 year anniversary of the St. Mary Magdalene Church Picnic in Owensboro, Kentucky. Several thousand pounds of meat will cook over 100 feet of fire and smoke.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Three-Alarm Fire
programme.desc: Roger visits Faith's Farm in Bonfield, IL for an awesome feast cooked on three different fiery contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Grillin' and Smokin'
programme.desc: Roger is grilling steaks and chickens in California, and smoking a bounty of seafood in Illinois. High heat for meat and low smoke for seafood.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Phenomenal Philly Food Feast
programme.desc: Nick Lachey hooks up with Michael Symon in Philadelphia, one of the best beer cities in the country with a food scene to match. From Chef Jose Garces' over-the-top bourbon burger, to true German smoked sausages.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beef, Belly, Bacon and Bourbon
programme.desc: In Savannah, Ga., Michael Symon starts with sweet and savory pork belly sliders with bacon jam and bourbon sauce, nestled inside a fluffy doughnut bun.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bacon Knows Best
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon takes down a towering fortress of succulent ribs and a sandwich that's a meaty trifecta of juicy brisket, pork and sausage.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Dangerously Good Eats
programme.desc: Chef Michael Symon sinks his teeth into a burger in Memphis, Tenn., that's so dangerously good, innocent bystanders had better beware! Then pizza gets a brunch makeover in Atlanta with creamy scrambled eggs and crispy pancetta.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Wilmington, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary adventures take him to the port city of Wilmington, North Carolina, for a barbecue bonanza, a totally bonkers burrito and a big, bad behemoth in the undefeated Pierogi Team Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Florida Keys
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to the Florida Keys for a bad-to-the-bone shrimp burrito and Ropa Vieja at a Cuban institution. Then he grabs a fork for the largest slice of pie he's ever seen in The Fish House's Key Lime Pie Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Diego, CA
programme.desc: Casey travels to San Diego to face off against a five and a half pound stack of pancakes layered with bacon, eggs, sausage, country-fried steak and thick-cut ham.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Worcester, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb lands in Worcester, MA, where he slurps down some radical ramen, indulges in peanut butter cup French toast and takes on a rack of deep-fried ribs with the heat of a million Scoville units.
