programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Heirloom Home on the Shore
programme.desc: After 40 years of use, third-generation owners have decided to add facilities and living quarters to a family camp for large annual family reunions.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the YMCA
programme.desc: The Kennebec Valley YMCA in Augusta, Maine needs a new play structure and the Cabin Masters know just the crew for the job! Ryan decides to build a workshop for Chase. The team works feverishly to finish both projects before everything freezes over.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: River House of Dreams
programme.desc: Designer Sarah Richardson is back at the country house with some valuable advice on the design of the master en-suite. Meanwhile at the suburban house, the guys use some cool technology to improve the home's energy efficiency.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Smart Suburban Holmes
programme.desc: With the interior of the river house complete, it's time to focus on the suburban home as the open house date is fast approaching. Mike, MJ and the crew work feverishly to get the smart home ready and receive the valuation they're hoping to earn.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Thousand Goodbyes
programme.desc: Flooring takes center stage inside the country house, while outside the barn is finally completed. The river house gets its finishing touches as Mike and MJ prepare to say goodbye to the Thousand Islands.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Holmes Stretch
programme.desc: The first property that Mike Holmes and his son, MJ, bought is the last to be finished. Time is money, and there's still a ton of work to be done before they can put the sign up on the lawn.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Nightmares and Dreams
programme.desc: A marathon runner hired a contractor to design her perfect kitchen, but he was unqualified and ended up compromising the home's structure. Now it's up to Mike and his kids to make things right and restore her peace of mind.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Thousand Goodbyes
programme.desc: Flooring takes center stage inside the country house, while outside the barn is finally completed. The river house gets its finishing touches as Mike and MJ prepare to say goodbye to the Thousand Islands.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Lawn and Order: Slippery Slope
programme.desc: With an upcoming move fast approaching, a couple with three boys needs to put their home on the market as soon as possible. Their sloped yard and aging features aren't helping, so Chris and Sara stretch their bucket to get the value up.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Texas-Sized Renovation On South Padre Island
programme.desc: A couple and their four kids are looking for a vacation retreat on South Padre Island in Texas. After recently renovating a rental property in the area, they've decided they are ready to get their hands dirty again.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Beachfront or Bust in Myrtle Beach
programme.desc: Brad grew up spending summers in North Myrtle Beach, South Carolina. Now he's ready to find a vacation home for his family, and local broker Jason Moore is just the man to help them find it, along with some help from his wife and kids.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Westport Wonder
programme.desc: An outdoor enthusiast couple loves spending time at the beach in Westport, WA, and decide to buy a vacation home. The house they choose needs a major overhaul, but their limited budget may prevent their planned renovation.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Galveston Getaway
programme.desc: This couple is ready to find a beach home of their own after years of visiting relatives on the sunny shores of Galveston, TX. They find a house with potential but it's in need of serious work.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Florida Engagement Renovation
programme.desc: Newly engaged couple Missy and Devon are looking to purchase their first home together in Ormond-by-the-Sea, Florida. With their wedding months away, the project threatens to be too much for the young couple to handle.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountain Paradise
programme.desc: The Kings take on their most spectacular project to date when a young family asks them to build the perfect pool for their dream home overlooking the mountains outside Ogden, Utah. They want the works including a 50 ft. long, 12 ft. deep pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Clean Lines and Clean Water
programme.desc: A family's three daughters can't get enough of swimming, but their mom's chlorine sensitivity prevents her from joining in on the fun at the community pool. A special ozone system is installed that will allow her to swim.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Hole in the Plan
programme.desc: An active Florida family recently traded in the tropical life for the cool countryside in Auburntown, Tennessee.

programme.title: Pool Kings: It's About Time
programme.desc: A family that had to delay pool plans after building a new home is finally ready to make their backyard vision a reality.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Game Time
programme.desc: After dealing with hot summers and limited options for swimming, a Tennessee father has decided it's time to get a pool of his own. The Pool Kings are up for the task and create a sports pool that will provide endless entertainment.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Build the Pool and They Will Come
programme.desc: Grandparents want an irresistible pool to ensure the grandkids will want to spend plenty of time at their new place. Steve and Justin come through with a beautiful raised pool design featuring a huge deck that triples the entertaining space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: All About the View
programme.desc: Steve and Justin are determined to convert a couple's neglected '80s-style pool into a modern lakeside paradise, but hidden engineering issues make this build more complicated than it seems.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Vegas Jackpot Swimming Pool
programme.desc: A Las Vegas family hits the jackpot when Paul and Brian come to design the pool of their dreams. The guys are put to the test to turn the narrow desert yard into a world of water that includes splash pads, an outdoor kitchen and a pro volleyball net.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Dueling Waterslides
programme.desc: Brian and Paul design the perfect pool complete with giant dueling waterslides. They face a slippery slope, however, when they battle equipment issues while building an artificial hill to support tens of thousands of pounds of natural granite rock.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Million Dollar View Pool
programme.desc: The King family seeks help building their new palace in the sunny hills of California. The Pool Kings find themselves between a rock ledge and hard design while bringing this build to life on a sloped property.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Nola
programme.desc: New Orleans charms viewers with its distinct culinary style.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Philadelphia
programme.desc: We're going to Philadelphia to show you some of the best things we ever ate. There's impossibly delicious pasta at Vetri and perfect mashed potatoes at Parc.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Fix Four Ways
programme.desc: Michael begins his meat-seeking journey in Lockhart, Texas, where one family remains at the forefront of America's greatest barbecue after four generations. Next, he swings over to a British-style joint in Brooklyn where they use lobster meat.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Extra Meat Please
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Queens, New York, with a burger loaded to the max with beef, ham, bacon and sausage.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Champion Burger Knockouts
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in San Diego with a Champ Burger loaded with beer-braised pork that packs a powerful punch, and he can't pass up a cookie-brownie mashup that satisfies every sweet tooth.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Super Smoked and Savory
programme.desc: In Queens, New York, Michael Symon dives into the juiciest, meatiest, triple-stacked burger with beef, lamb and turkey. Some of the most authentic Mexican lamb barbacoa this side of the border is found in Houston, Texas.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Surf And Turf
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is scouring the country for fiery fresh takes on the beloved classic combination, surf and turf.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat In Full Swing
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets up with a few culinary titans in Tennessee who are swinging for the fences with outrageous rigs. At Wedge Oak Farm in Lebanon, Tenn., he joins Chef Trey Cioccia, owner of Nashville's Black Rabbit, to set up the Burn Tower.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Southern Sizzle and Smoke
programme.desc: At a non-profit organization to support veterans in Georgia, Roger Mooking helps cook a whole mutton and slow-roast veggies for a cookout. At Bob Sykes Bar-B-Q in Bessemer, AL, he loads 250 pounds of salted pork into a 15-foot pit.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fireside Hangs
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is hanging out with two chefs putting a whole new spin on rotisserie cooking in the great outdoors. At SpringHouse restaurant in Alexander City, Ala., Chef Rob McDaniel has designed a fire-fueled contraption that he and Roger use to roast.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Big Island
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern heads to Hawaii's Big Island to take in its laid-back cuisine. From ancient traditions like lau lau and opakapaka fish to new traditions like the loco moco and huli chicken, he dives deep into the island's food culture.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Tokyo
programme.desc: Tokyo, Japan, is a world leader in everything from finance to technology -- and food! In a spectacular city known for such edible icons as sushi and tempura, Andrew Zimmern explores just what makes this destination so delicious.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Scottish Highlands
programme.desc: Andrew explores the bountiful larder and proud history that provides chefs in the Scottish Highlands with the building blocks for uniquely Highland dishes. He enjoys lean, flavourful Highland beef, buttery shellfish, and handheld meat pies.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Montevideo
programme.desc: Andrew digs into the culinary treasures of Uruguay's capital city, Montevideo. He explores this meaty mecca by highlighting their slow-cooked Asado meats, a thin-sliced steak sandwich called chivito, and breaded and fried beef.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Granny Awards/ Sick Day
programme.desc: Dave is thrilled when he thinks he's nominated for a Grammy, but it's actually an award for aging musicians. Alvin and Kevin pretend to be sick to miss school and sneak off to the Dagarack Convention.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Alvin's Secret Powers/ I Will Survive
programme.desc: Alvin tells Theodore that he has secret powers and can turn trash into candy. Later, when Alvin gets hurt, Simon agrees to face off against Derek on a survival reality show, where there's room for only one winner.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Dreamgoat/ The Same Game
programme.desc: Timmy feels sorry for the town's prize goat; everyone becomes the same.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Clark Laser/ Married to the Mom
programme.desc: When Timmy and Chloe save Dark Laser's beloved pet, Flipsie, Dark Laser becomes bound to them as their bodyguard. Timmy and Chloe wish up a girlfriend for Mr. Crocker to get him off their backs.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Which is Wish/ Nuts and Dangerous
programme.desc: After Timmy and Chloe switch places, they might be stuck forever. Timmy and Dad take part in a film festival to be closer, but it ends up causing tension.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairy Con/ The Hungry Games
programme.desc: Mr. Crocker creates Wonky Cosmo and Wanda clones to get into a Fairy Convention to steal all the fairies' magic. Timmy wishes Chloe could live out her favorite dystopian movie, but quickly regrets it when everyone is hungry.

programme.title: The Loud House: Project Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln has to get to school on time but getting his sisters out the door proves to be the biggest obstacle of all.

programme.title: Ollie's Pack: King Swelly Belly
programme.desc: Ollie teams up with a monster gut slug to win an eating contest, and find love.

programme.title: The Loud House: April Fools Rules/ Cereal Offender
programme.desc: Every April Fool’s Day, Luan pranks the entire household, but this year, Lincoln has a plan to not get pranked. The Loud kids make a trip to the supermarket to do the grocery shopping for Mom, but Lincoln has other plans.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Abrasive Side / Earworm
programme.desc: SpongeBob can never say 'no'; SpongeBob has a song stuck in his head.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Treats!/ For Here or to Go
programme.desc: Gary goes crazy over the new snail treats SpongeBob brought home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gramma's Secret Recipe/ The Cent of Money
programme.desc: Plankton disguises himself as SpongeBob's grandmother.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Buried in Time/ Enchanted Tiki Dream
programme.desc: SpongeBob builds a dream world for Squidward; The gang is caught in a time capsule.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Keep Bikini Bottom Beautiful/ A Pal for Gary
programme.desc: Squidward cleans up the city of Bikini Bottom with 'help' from SpongeBob. SpongeBob brings Gary a pet that terrorizes him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Someone's in the Kitchen With Sandy/ The Inside Job
programme.desc: Plankton steals Sandy's fur to disguise himself as Sandy and get the Krabby Patty formula. Plankton goes inside SpongeBob's head to get the Krabby Patty formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pineapple Fever/ Chum Caverns
programme.desc: Squidward gets stuck indoors with SpongeBob and Patrick during a storm. Plankton creates an underground restaurant that threatens to put the Krusty Krab out of business.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gullible Pants/ Overbooked
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs leaves SpongeBob in charge of the Krusty Krab for 15 minutes. SpongeBob triple-books his schedule, and does his best to be at all three events at the same time.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shuffleboarding/ Prefessor Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get carried away when they fill in for Mermaidman and Barnacleboy. Squidward poses as the teacher at a prestigious music school. But SpongeBob and Patrick show up and nearly blow his cover.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Krushers/ The Card
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick become wrestlers as part of Mr. Krab's newest get-rich quick scheme.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Inmates of Summer/ To Save a Squirrel
programme.desc: Instead of getting on the ship headed for summer camp, SpongeBob and Patrick accidentally board a ship full of prisoners on their way to jail on Inferno Island.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Two Faces of Squidward
programme.desc: Squidward has a surgery to fix his face after SpongeBob slams a door on him accidentally. However, the surgery makes him amazingly beautiful.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: One Coarse Meal/ Gary in Love
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs finds out that Plankton's afraid of whales. / Gary falls for a snail named Mary.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Back to the Past / The Bad Guy Club for Villains
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick travel back in time to see the young Mermaidman and Barnacleboy. The pair enjoy a classic Mermaidman and Barnacleboy episode.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Picture Day/ Pat No Pay/ Blackjack
programme.desc: SpongeBob must attend Picture Day for the Boating School Year Book; Patrick steals.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Missing Identity/ Plankton's Army
programme.desc: SpongeBob loses his nametag; Plankton is after the Krabby Patty Secret Formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tutor Sauce/ Lost in Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to take a shortcut to work, but gets lost along the way. After failing his driver's test, Mr. Krabs decides to teach SpongeBob how to drive himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sweet and Sour Squidward/ The Googly Artiste
programme.desc: Plankton tries to befriend Squidward so he can get the Krabby Patty formula. When an art critic deems Patrick a true artiste for his rocks-with-googly-eyes creations, everyone in Bikini Bottom clamours for a Patrick original.

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination

programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Fast and the Phineas/ Lawn Gnome Beach Party of Terror

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Unfair Science Fair / Unfair Science Fair Redux
programme.desc: Two stepbrothers build various objects with materials found around their home.

programme.desc: Phoebe talks Rachel into getting a tattoo with her and then chickens out; Joey moves out.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Eddie Moves In
programme.desc: Chandler gets a strange new roommate and Phoebe gets the chance to record 'Smelly Cat.'

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Dr. Ramoray Dies
programme.desc: Joey is finding success in playing Dr. Drake Ramoray on TV series 'Days of Our Lives'. He even has an interview published in TV magazine. Unfortunately, he also makes the mistake of telling the journalist he made up most of his own lines for the show.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Eddie Won't Go
programme.desc: Joey needs to move back in with Chandler but there are problems getting rid of Eddie.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Old Yeller Dies
programme.desc: Chandler and Joey invite Richard to a basketball game and he is the life of the party.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Bullies
programme.desc: Chandler and Ross confront two bullies who have taken over their couch at Central Perk.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Two Parties
programme.desc: Monica organizes Rachel's birthday party and invites Rachel's divorced mother and father.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Chicken Pox
programme.desc: Phoebe catches chicken pox and passes it on to her boyfriend; Joey gets a job.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Barry and Mindy's Wedding
programme.desc: Rachel is a bridesmaid at her ex-fiancé's wedding; Monica and Richard have differences.

programme.title: American Dad!: Merlot Down Dirty Shame
programme.desc: When Roger and Francine go wine-tasting, Roger plants a big kiss on Francine in a drunken moment. Francine decides to tell Stan about this incident, but when they sit down to talk, Roger convinces Stan that Francine started it all.

programme.title: American Dad!: Bully for Steve
programme.desc: Roger announces that he is putting a portfolio together in order to study crime scene photos. Meanwhile, when Stan follows Steve around for the day and discovers that he avoids obstacles, he decides to bully Steve in order to toughen him up.

programme.title: The Registry
programme.desc: When the United States military needed help defeating Japan in WWII, they called on second-generation Japanese-Americans (the 'Nisei') from the internment camps to serve in a confidential unit called the Military Intelligence Service.

programme.title: BBC World News: America
programme.desc: BBC correspondent Katty Kay anchors BBC AMERICA's award-winning hour-long, U.S.-targeted nightly newscast.

programme.title: BBC World News Outside Source
programme.desc: Live from the heart of the BBC newsroom, the programme that gathers the latest information as it arrives from news wires, video feeds and social media on the biggest stories of the day.

programme.title: PBS NewsHour
programme.desc: An analysis of current events with a news summary, discussions, and news features.

programme.title: Cycle of Health
programme.desc: Physicians bring to life compelling stories of how physical and emotion well being is just as effective in delivering good health as exercise and diet. Stories shared about people pursuing healthy and happy lives.

programme.title: Second Opinion: Taking Charge of Your Health Care: Childhood Vaccines
programme.desc: Some parents believe vaccines are linked to childhood conditions.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: Les Miserables: Barricades
programme.desc: Marius mans the barricades, where a hostile Valjean intercepts him. They end up fleeing together through the sewers of Paris. Cosette’s story reaches its conclusion. So does Javert’s.

programme.title: Last Tango in Halifax: Family Disputers and a Medical Crisis
programme.desc: Celia reacts badly to John’s revelation that Caroline is gay. When she and Alan have dinner with Caroline and Kate, she’s very rude to Kate. Alan feels crushed after this, and he tells Gillian that it’s over between him and Celia.

programme.title: Amanpour and Company
programme.desc: In-depth conversations with global thought leaders and cultural influencers.

programme.title: On Story: A Conversation With Lulu Wang
programme.desc: Lulu Wang discusses writing and directing her autobiographical film 'The Farewell.'

programme.title: College Behind Bars: Every Single Word Matters
programme.desc: The debate union faces their rival across the river, West Point. Rodney, Sebastian and Giovannie embark on year-long senior projects. Newly released from federal prison, Dyjuan’s younger brother, Kanan, comes for a visit, as does Rodney’s sister, Elitha.

programme.title: American Experience: Mr. Tornado
programme.desc: Meet pioneering meteorologist Ted Fujita, who transformed our understanding of tornados. Learn how we can protect ourselves and our communities.

programme.title: The Greatest Bond
programme.desc: Follow this inspirational and heartwarming documentary, which highlights the journey of disabled veterans whose lives are forever changed through the unconditional love of service dogs that have been expertly trained by female prison inmates.

programme.title: Nature: Spy in the Wild: The Poles
programme.desc: From penguin chicks to elephant seals, and wolf cubs to polar bears, the spy creatures meet and observe the hardiest and most charismatic animals in the Arctic and Antarctic circles.

programme.title: Nova: Eagle Power
programme.desc: Eagles dominate the skies. With access to a new bald eagle family, witness the danger and drama of chicks struggling to survive, and what makes these predators so special.

programme.title: Sit and Be Fit: Wake Your Body With Exercise
programme.desc: A towel is used to improve range of motion.

programme.title: Peg + Cat: The Race Car Problem/ The Big Gig Problem
programme.desc: Peg and Cat rebuild their homemade race car, 'Hot Buttered Lightnin',' to compete in a race.

programme.title: Cyberchase: Be Reasonable
programme.desc: Hacker returns to the Cybrary to wreak revenge on Ms. Fileshare and the kids. His crafty plan tricks the kids to try to rescue Ms. Fileshare, only to find them all trapped. If the CyberSquad doesn't escape in time, Hacker will steal the books.

programme.title: Molly of Denali: Berry Itchy Day/ Herring Eggs or Bust
programme.desc: Tooey has agreed to watch the Trading Post while Molly and her family head to their super-secret-berry-picking-spot. Molly is thrilled when her cousin Randall calls from Sitka to say he’s harvesting herring eggs—her absolute favorite food.

programme.title: Nova: Eagle Power
programme.desc: Eagles dominate the skies. With access to a new bald eagle family, witness the danger and drama of chicks struggling to survive, and what makes these predators so special.

programme.title: History Detectives: Top Secret Drone, Roosevelt's War Club & Clara Barton Letter
programme.desc: A propeller could be from a World War II drone, and an inscribed wooden club may have been a gift to Teddy Roosevelt. A letter from Clara Barton shows concern for the welfare of a soldier.

programme.title: Get the Math
programme.desc: Middle and high school students are helped to develop algebraic thinking skills for solving real-world problems.

programme.title: Get the Math 2.0
programme.desc: Real-world scenarios help students develop algebraic thinking skills with a focus on reasoning.

programme.title: Breakthrough: The Ideas That Changed the World: The Car
programme.desc: Go for a ride through the 9,000-year history of the car, from its roots in dogsleds to Henry Ford’s affordable and assembly line-built Model T, and meet the scientists working on the next generation of self-driving automobiles.

programme.title: Nova: Eagle Power
programme.desc: Eagles dominate the skies. With access to a new bald eagle family, witness the danger and drama of chicks struggling to survive, and what makes these predators so special.

programme.title: Big Pacific: Passionate
programme.desc: The quest to multiply has spawned a stunning array of unusual behaviors and adaptations. View forest penguins with a tenuous marriage and the secret rendezvous of great white sharks, and hear the tale of male pregnancy.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: Howards End
programme.desc: Mrs. Wilcox's family is surprised by her final request. The Schlegels face eviction. The Schlegel sisters take up the cause of Jacky Bast's husband.

programme.title: Civilizations: What Is Art (Good For)?
programme.desc: Explore art in the age of revolution, war and profound scientific change and consider the question: Should art create a separate realm, a place of escape, or should it plunge into the chaos, transforming the way we see and live in the world.

programme.title: Latino Americans: Foreigners in Their Own Land
programme.desc: Survey the history and people from the first Spanish explorations in North America to the Mexican-American War.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Fallacy
programme.desc: An assaulted female partygoer kills her attacker, and then claims it was done in self-defence.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Chicago Crossover
programme.desc: Voight, Lindsay and Halstead track a child-pornography victim to his last-know whereabouts in New York City, where Benson and the SVU squad get a new lead. Lindsay discovers someone from her past is involved and hopes to find the ringleader.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Spousal Privilege
programme.desc: Detective Tutuola comes across leaked security footage of a violent domestic dispute in a parking garage showing a sportscaster hitting his girlfriend. Benson investigates the couple's lifestyle and history while the girlfriend pushes back.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Pattern Seventeen
programme.desc: When a series of young, petite, girls are all assaulted in the early morning hours, Rollins matches the pattern to several rape cases she worked in Atlanta.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Forgiving Rollins
programme.desc: Atlanta's Deputy Chief, Charles Patton, and his newest detective, Reese Taymor, visit New York for a law enforcement conference. When Reese is found unconscious in her hotel room, she cries rape at the scene but changes her story soon afterwards.

programme.title: Modern Family: Hit and Run
programme.desc: When Jay becomes frustrated at work and Manny stresses about schoolwork, neither one seems to want Gloria's help. Phil and Claire run into Councilman Duane Bailey again, who is campaigning for his second run.

programme.title: Modern Family: Go Bullfrogs!
programme.desc: Phil takes Haley on a college tour of his old alma mater, and Claire forces Mitchell and Cameron to take her for a fun night out with the boys. Meanwhile, Gloria and Jay deal with a situation at home that may require having 'the talk' with Manny.

programme.title: Modern Family: Treehouse
programme.desc: Gloria is jealous of another couple's activity level and demands that Jay step it up for a night of salsa dancing. Cameron takes a bet too far when Mitchell and Crispin challenge him to get a woman's number at the bar.

programme.title: Modern Family: After the Fire
programme.desc: When a neighbourhood home burns down, the whole family gets together to help out.

programme.title: Modern Family: Lifetime Supply
programme.desc: When Phil misses the call from his doctor's office with his test results, he automatically jumps to conclusions and starts saying his goodbyes. Javier pops up unannounced again and takes Manny to the horse races for a belated birthday celebration.

programme.title: Modern Family: Egg Drop
programme.desc: Luke and Manny are given a school project to design a capsule that will protect an egg from a two-story drop, but when Claire and Jay catch wind of it, their own competitive drives kick in.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: I Remember Her Now
programme.desc: The body of a young girl is found crushed in an abandoned building after she runs away from a treatment centre for troubled girls. Voight sends Halstead to work undercover inside the centre, where he believes something shady is happening.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Big Friends, Big Enemies
programme.desc: When a car plows through a crowd of concert-goers and gunfire erupts, Lindsay and Ruzek are on the scene. Unsure of the motive and concerned about terrorism, they order Homeland Security to assist in the investigation.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A War Zone
programme.desc: Intelligence is tasked with tracking down the dealers of fentanyl, a drug that has been linked to multiple overdoses around the city. As they investigate possible sources, the team uncovers a series of dealers in a college smuggling ring.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Some Friend
programme.desc: After receiving a complaint, Burgess and Sorensen find the body of a young girl inside a baseball player’s home. There is conflict in the case when it is determined the player is friends with Olinsky.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: 300,000 Likes
programme.desc: Voight calls the team to investigate a homicide involving the only witness in a rape and murder case against an extremely young man. Intelligence investigates the accused's family to see if someone was paid to take out the victim.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Happenstance
programme.desc: When identical twins are found dead on the same night, the CSI team investigates whether or not the two murders are connected. However, as the team digs deeper into the histories of the women, a surprising twist takes the investigation in a new direction.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Fighting Shadows
programme.desc: When three FBI agents are killed in an explosion following a successful undercover sting operation, the tem searches for the person behind the attack. Meanwhile, Deeks and Kensi realize the team knows about their relationship.

programme.title: NCIS: Newborn King
programme.desc: When a navy captain is killed in a hotel room, NCIS must track down and protect his very pregnant companion from unknown assailants. Meanwhile, Jimmy has problems of his own when he brings his future father-in-law to work.

programme.title: NCIS: House Divided
programme.desc: Two months after Gibbs and McGee were last seen fighting an elusive group of rebels in a Paraguay jungle, the NCIS team in D.C. tirelessly searches for their missing colleagues. Also, Vance and Torres are summoned to a congressional hearing.

programme.title: NCIS: Twofer
programme.desc: NCIS is called in to investigate when the body of a missing Navy Lieutenant who disappeared a year and a half ago is located by a cemetery grounds crew. Also, Gibbs and McGee must pass a psych evaluation with Dr. Grace Confalone before resuming all work.

programme.title: NCIS: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: While on a stakeout with Metro P.D., Torres’ partner mysteriously vanishes, with the subsequent investigation leading NCIS to uncover new evidence from a decade-old murder.

programme.title: NCIS: Skeleton Crew
programme.desc: The team investigates the kidnapping of a sailor during a storm that shuts down Washington D.C. and knocks out power.

programme.title: NCIS: Fake It 'Til You Make It
programme.desc: After Reeves sees his friend get kidnapped, the team discovers the primary suspect disappeared two days ago with confidential military information. Also, an embarrassing photo from McGee's teenage years becomes a popular meme.

programme.title: NCIS: Trapped
programme.desc: After a petty officer is found murdered on a golf course, McGee spends hours on the victim's ham radio trying to locate a key witness. Also, Palmer asks his co-workers to donate to a charity that builds playgrounds for kids of all abilities.

programme.title: NCIS: Burden of Proof
programme.desc: After a convicted felon swears the NCIS agency framed him for murder a decade ago, Gibbs begins his own investigation, starting with a new autopsy by Ducky. Also, Senior FBI Agent Fornell joins the team.

programme.title: NCIS: Voices
programme.desc: An NCIS person of interest in a bribery and fraud case is found murdered after a runner is led to his body by a strange voice. Also, McGee and Delilah disagree on whether to find out the baby's sex or keep it a surprise.

programme.desc: When a chance encounter leads to a romantic day together, Jonathan and Sarah decide to test fate: they part ways to see if destiny will reunite them again. Years later, the separated lovers use the little information they have to find each other again.

programme.desc: When an affluent family learns that a homeless teenager is attending their children's school, they invite him home and make him a part of their family. Under the guidance and nurturing of the family, the boy becomes a football star and an NFL prospect.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: All Bets Are Off

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The President's Coming
programme.desc: An FBI agent investigates the girls' lives for a possible visit from President Bush. This leads the girls to reminisce about times they have spent together.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The President's Coming

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche Delivers

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Once in St. Olaf

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: When two women are murdered in a state park, Indiana police suspected a serial killer, until they looked at the evidence more deeply and were brought in totally different directions.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer is found dead in her bed, and authorities initially believe the cause of death to be accidental suffocation by a laundry bag, but further forensic investigation reveals the horrifying truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: Police must search for a boy who goes missing mysteriously after his home burns down and are disheartened when they find his body, but the killer left behind numerous clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When a frantic call from a man claiming his wife fell down the stairs brings investigators to their home, they are concerned by the unusually large number of bloodstains, and how big they are.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a police officer is murdered in her own home. After a decade a newly formed cold case unit took a new look at the case, and using a fragment of a 911 call, they caught the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: An attractive young hairstylist is murdered in her South Carolina salon, and police are at a loss. A tiny hair and a DNA test force police to take another look nearly a decade after the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Signed, Sealed and Delivered
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes in a home, police believe it was an act of revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out
programme.desc: A college student is found dead and the evidence suggests he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Summer Obsession
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police are called to the scene of what appears to be an accidental drowning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: Police fear a serial killer is on the loose when two women in the same town are murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: When two women are murdered in a state park, Indiana police suspected a serial killer, until they looked at the evidence more deeply and were brought in totally different directions.

programme.desc: A gruesome discovery in a small town church sends investigators on a search for a killer.

programme.desc: After a young mom is found brutally murdered in her home, investigators find startling clues on her cell phone that could lead to her killer.

programme.desc: A mysterious murder in an upscale community is solved by cell phone forensics.

programme.desc: A healthy, young mother mysteriously dies after a minor traffic accident triggering an investigation to find out what caused of her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: A Native American woman is found murdered less than 10 miles from where a male Native American was murdered two years earlier. Police begin to wonder if a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager goes missing after an evening of horseback riding, and her body is found a month later, three miles from her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Strength in Pain
programme.desc: An adventuress and a wilderness instructor take on the Honduras rainforest. They survive punishing storms and frigid nights, but a terrifying, close encounter with a deadly snake brings this pair to the breaking point.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Himalayan Hell
programme.desc: Two survivalists try to survive for 21 days in the high altitude and extreme cold of the Himalayan foothills in northern India. In the face of severe dehydration, one survivalist's debilitating illness threatens to derail both their chances of success.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Argentina Impossible
programme.desc: A survival instructor teams up with a pediatrician to fight storms, cold and starvation in Argentina's Yungas Cloud Forest. It's a race against time as the pair puts their skills to the test before hypothermia shuts them down.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: Missing in Action
programme.desc: Survivalists struggle in a variety of environments, from the Mexican island jungle to the brutal swamps of Florida. Storms and injuries hamper their efforts, but the real challenge comes when one of the survivalists goes missing.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Two pairs of strangers, unaware of the others' existence, are dropped miles apart in the Panamanian rainforest to survive for 21 days under the harshest of conditions; each couple battles the elements, each other, and their own inner weaknesses.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: Marty Raney and his daughter teach families the necessary skills to live off the grid.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Breaking Borneo
programme.desc: Puma Cabra and Julie Wright have to survive in Sabah, Borneo for 21 days.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: Surviving Naked
programme.desc: Two survivalists attempt to survive for 21 days in the Costa Rican rainforest, despite a deadly snake bite on a producer. Fighting sickness and no food, a stay-at-home mom and a trucker unite to ward off hunger by eating a skunk.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Two pairs of strangers, unaware of the others' existence, are dropped miles apart in the Panamanian rainforest to survive for 21 days under the harshest of conditions; each couple battles the elements, each other, and their own inner weaknesses.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue

programme.title: Auction Kings: Dino Poo/ Ancient Head Pipe
programme.desc: The Gallery 63 crew receives a package of dino poo. Owner Paul hopes the signature on an original-issue version of Gone With The Wind proves legitimate this time. And his visit to mystical Lithia Springs yields an ancient skull-shaped jadeite pipe.

programme.title: Auction Kings: Jim Morrison Poem/ Cabbage Patch Babies
programme.desc: Gallery 63 auctions off a part-car/ part-motorcycle Lomax Trike and a forgotten handwritten poem by the Door's Jim Morrison. Paul learns 'doll' is a four-letter word when he takes in two Cabbage Patch Kids.

programme.title: Auction Kings: King, Bling, and Rodeo Ring
programme.desc: A three-carat, platinum-band ring catches manager Cindy's eye, but it's a humble bull sack purse that inspires her to hold Gallery 63's first mechanical bull rodeo. The Gallery 63 crew also takes in a vintage dive helmet and a ship's binnacle.

programme.title: Auction Kings: Moonshine Still/ Civil War Iron Knuckles
programme.desc: The Gallery 63 crew take in Civil War-era iron knuckles found on a local battlefield. Owner Paul squeezes into a particularly mini British Mini Cooper. And a family's moonshine still inspires picker Jon to try his hand at home brewing for the Gallery.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Can You Dig It?
programme.desc: From a treacherous island prison in Ireland to a California mining town that saw more than its share of murder and mayhem, Josh digs deep to uncover the buried secrets of six legendary locations.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Moment of Truth
programme.desc: From a Florida prison where a convicted murderer went from hated to hero to the site of a fiery Viking massacre in Ireland, Josh explores six legendary locations where heroes and villains faced their moment of truth.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Slave to Love
programme.desc: From a former spy hub on the coast of Spain to a cave in Puerto Rico that just might hold the fabled Fountain of Youth, Josh explores six legendary locations where passionate people risked it all for love.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Amelia Earhart
programme.desc: Josh hunts down new evidence on the iconic disappearance of Amelia Earhart. He first treks to uncharted tribal lands of PNG, then ends his journey in Fiji hoping to uncover the human remains of Amelia.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mystery of Dead Mountain
programme.desc: Braving the sub-zero conditions of Siberia, Josh Gates investigates one of the strangest and most brutal cold cases of all-time: the Dyatlov Pass Incident. Nine Soviet hikers died suspiciously. Sixty years later, no one knows how or why.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Siberia's Coldest Case
programme.desc: Josh Gates concludes his in-depth investigation of the Dyatlov Pass Incident. Taking on Dead Mountain's brutal conditions, Josh and two investigators re-trace the last steps of the hikers. A big discovery could finally solve the mystery.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Columbus: Legend or Liar?
programme.desc: Josh travels worldwide to uncover the myths behind Christopher Columbus.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Butch Cassidy's Lost Loot
programme.desc: Josh immerses himself in Wild West lore on a quest to find Butch Cassidy's missing money. He traces the iconic outlaw's footsteps through Colorado, Utah and Nevada, eventually learning that he may need to find the man himself to locate the lost loot.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Searching For America's Lost Flight
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates why Northwest Flight 2501 vanished, taking the lives of all 58 people on board.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Viking Secrets
programme.desc: Josh investigates how a group of Norse tribesman gained power in medieval Europe. His search begins in their one-time home base of Denmark and continues on to the first place they expanded off continent, the remote island of Iceland.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Vikings in America
programme.desc: Josh traces the Vikings' westward expansion from the volcanic landscape of Iceland to a mysterious settlement in Greenland and into North America. He aims to find out if the Norse explorers landed in the United States.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Under the Knife
programme.desc: Amy undergoes gastric bypass surgery to change her life, but endangers herself by not sticking to the post-op diet. Tammy seeks support from her love interest, Jerry. Two months later, the sisters reveal the changes they've made to family and friends.

programme.desc: Seana is 23 and nearly 700 lbs, living at her mom's house. She is depressed and anxious and her weight-gain threatens to take her last breath. Dr. Now can give her the tools she needs to live, but until she chooses life, no one can save Seana but Seana.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: Leneatha's Story
programme.desc: For 23 years, Leneatha has worked as a pharmacy tech at a local hospital. Now, she has a young daughter to support, but she's so big that it's hard to move. If Dr. Now can't help her stop eating, losing her job could be the least of her worries.

programme.desc: Carrie's fling weighs on her conscience; Charlotte plays hardball over a pre-nup.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Running With Scissors
programme.desc: Carrie seeks advice about Big; Samantha's new guy wants her to be tested for AIDS.

programme.title: Kourtney & Khloé Take the Hamptons: What's That Racquet?
programme.desc: After Kourtney admonishes Scott for breaking the boundaries they've set for their relationship, he makes attempts to clean up his act and get back in her good graces. Meanwhile, Khloé tries to get Scott on a healthy track with tennis.

programme.title: Kourtney & Khloé Take the Hamptons: Party Crashing
programme.desc: When Kourtney learns that Kim is using her home for North's birthday party without her permission, she flies to LA to confront her. Back in the Hamptons, Scott finds himself in the hospital after partying too much and realizes he must make a change.

programme.title: Kourtney & Khloé Take the Hamptons: 12 Steps and 30 Candles
programme.desc: Scott finally decides to make a change in his life and checks into rehab, but his commitment to stay wavers with each day. As her 30th birthday quickly approaches, Khloé struggles with the realization that her life isn't where she thought it would be.

programme.title: Kourtney & Khloé Take the Hamptons: Aftershocks
programme.desc: After Scott unexpectedly leaves rehab early, Kourtney and Scott try to avoid repeating their past mistakes. Meanwhile, Kim begins doubting her best friend Jonathan's loyalty when family secrets are leaked to the media.

programme.title: Kourtney & Khloé Take the Hamptons: Kaptain Kourtney and Skipper Scott
programme.desc: Khloé takes her support of Scott to another level when she arranges for them to host a podcast together, but things get ugly when Scott backs out on his promise to be in French Montana's music video.

programme.title: Kourtney & Khloé Take the Hamptons: Riding Dirty
programme.desc: When Khloé rekindles her love for horseback riding, Scott and Kourtney make a secret wager on how long she will last. Meanwhile, Kourtney and Kim try to break Kris's cranky mood by cooking her up some romance.

programme.title: Kourtney & Khloé Take the Hamptons: There's No Smoke Without Fire Island
programme.desc: Scott, consumed by his negative associations with the Hamptons, decides to leave early. Khloé and Kourtney hire a new Dash Doll as a favor to Bruce, but decide to keep her busy in other ways.

programme.title: Kourtney & Khloé Take the Hamptons: A House Divided
programme.desc: Scott is still unable to set foot in his late parents' house, so Kourtney gets to work on fixing it up, hoping that she can convince him to keep it. Meanwhile, Kourtney gets upset when Khloé starts fraternizing with the Dash Dolls.

programme.title: Kourtney & Khloé Take the Hamptons: Best Friends With Benefits
programme.desc: When Khloé indulges in a night of drinking, Kourtney grows livid and accuses her of recklessly putting Scott's sobriety in jeopardy. Meanwhile, after Malika drunkenly kisses Khloé, Khloé begins to question what their friendship really means.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: 90 Day Fiancé’s Big Ed Brown speaks out on the latest controversy.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Have You Ever Seen the Rain?
programme.desc: While Danny adjusts to life at home, memories from the war plague him and his actions.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The Count of Montecito
programme.desc: Nessa is reunited with Fred Puterbaugh who professes his love and admiration for her.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Blood Is Thicker
programme.desc: Sam, Nessa, Mary and Delinda desperately attempt to find tenants for their new joint-home.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Catch of the Day
programme.desc: A stolen truckload of lobsters throws a wrench into Sam's plan for an elite wedding.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Never Give Up
programme.desc: One shot at Bobby Flay wasn't enough for Italian chef Pasquale Cozzolino and Canada's infamous Ivana Raca, who are back for more. Iron Chefs Alex Guarnaschelli and Stephanie Izard give the play-by-play and dole out their final shot at redemption.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Chi-Town Throws Down
programme.desc: Actress Sophia Bush and Chef Carla Hall decide which Windy City chef, Aaron Cuschieri or Jill Barron, has what it takes to blow Bobby Flay out of the arena.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Red Hot
programme.desc: A smokehouse master and a Californian take on Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Getting Crabby
programme.desc: A country boy and a Greco chef challenge Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Pump It Up
programme.desc: The laughs are flowing when comedian Tony Rock and jokester Alex Guarnaschelli heckle Bobby Flay in his own kitchen. Delaware chef Bill Clifton and Long Island's Stephan Bogardus compete for the last laugh.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Bobby vs. Food
programme.desc: Food Network Star winner Eddie Jackson brings in the ultimate battle buddy, Man vs. Food's Casey Webb, to throw all the manpower they can at Bobby Flay. Fine dining expert Eric Bolyard and seafood aficionado Sarah Wade duke it out for a shot at Bobby vs.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The View from the Top
programme.desc: Food Network's Michael Symon gets help from The View's Sunny Hostin as they try to cut Bobby Flay down to size. New York chef Pom Amaritnant duels with Chef Troy Gagliardo from North Carolina for a chance to dethrone the king.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Pretty Little Fryer
programme.desc: Best Baker in America's Scott Conant teams up with actress Sasha Pieterse to get the truth and a loss out of Bobby Flay. They get a little help from talented farm-to-table chef Anthony Lo Pinto and seafood maven Franco Robazetti.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Fixing a Family in Houston
programme.desc: Buried in debt, Habanera and the Guero in Houston, Texas, is on the verge of closing. The infighting is destroying the business, and a three-year-old daughter is stuck in the middle.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Tropical Punch
programme.desc: Well-travelled Chef Zach Meloy takes on a New Orleans transplant to Brooklyn, Chef Matt Pace, to prove their culinary chops. It's up to "Beach Bites'" Katie Lee and "Best Bakers in America's" Scott Conant to decide who has the skills to beat Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Say Cheese!
programme.desc: Seasoned farmer and chef Duskie Estes goes up against pasta heir Francesco Buitoni to put Bobby Flay out to pasture. It's up to Giada de Laurentis and Sunny Anderson to choose the chef that will plow Bobby down.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Against The Grain
programme.desc: Chopped host Ted Allen and Food Network's Damaris Phillips try to rewrite history. Attempting to make Bobby Flay's domination a thing of the past are Southern heirloom chef Paul Fehribach and spunky pan-Asian chef Sara Nguyen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Bobby Gets Sacked
programme.desc: Boston burger king Paul Malvone faces off against Twin City chef Jack Riebel on the gridiron. Former professional football player Eddie Jackson and sportscaster Jaymee Sire decide which chef gets the chance to sack Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Antonio
programme.desc: Andrew showcases the Tex-Mex favorites of San Antonio, Texas, including puffy tacos and a giant chalupa burger. Other featured foods include slow-cooked brisket, melt-in-your-mouth barbacoa and marinated stuffed quail cooked over mesquite.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Wisconsin State Fair and the State Fair of Texas
programme.desc: Eat your way through the Wisconsin State Fair and the State Fair of Texas.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Best Mex
programme.desc: We're searching out eight great Mexican food restaurants with ambitious dishes that go beyond the usual beans-and-rice platter. From a Peking duck taco to brisket enchiladas, we're finding the best Mexican crowd-pleasers.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Iconic Eats
programme.desc: We're counting down eight great restaurants serving up hometown heroes all over America. This is where you'll find the best version of a city's signature dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Baltimore, All the Time
programme.desc: Guy's hitting the pavement for a tasty tour of Baltimore. First, just off Dundalk Ave., a local legend cranks out all kinds of crab plates. Then, in the Hamilton neighbourhood, a farm-to-table spot cooks up bacon-wrapped meatloaf.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Standout Seafood
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's reeling in all kinds of standout seafood! There's a restaurant-market in Vancouver that's combining sustainability with killer cooking including their bouillabaisse and salmon fish and chips.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sausage, Shawarma and Scaloppini
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's travels take him to a unique little Italian restaurant in Wilmington, Del. that serves unbelievable arancini and veal scaloppini. A Middle Eastern street food spot in San Diego features some phenomenal falafel and shawarma.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: International Appeal
programme.desc: Guy's going on an international flavorfest.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Griddles n' Vittles
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's headed west for barbecue and beyond. In Los Angeles, a food court gem grills up homemade chorizo and a Yucatan turkey special. Then, in Las Vegas, Nevada, two funky joints fire up the grill.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Surf 'n' Turf Jackpot
programme.desc: Guy hits the surf 'n' turf jackpot in Mississippi and Oahu. He tries some tasty ribs, fritters as well as pork rinds.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bagels, Biscuit and Boar
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is diggin' into all kinds of flavour, starting in Santa Fe, N.M., at a pub serving comfort grub like chicken and biscuits and in-the-shell clam chowder. Also, a spot in Reno, NV, is on its game with a double elk chop and wild boar spaetzle.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Sampling Of Spain
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels all the way to Barcelona, Spain, for a sampling of Spanish cooking. He digs into everything from top-notch tapas, like prawns and quail, to traditional Catalan specialties, like mouth-watering meatballs.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Changing Tides

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Catch as Catch Can

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Final Hour
programme.desc: The captains race to catch the last of their remaining quotas, battling ice and equipment issues. Time Bandit's Scottie makes a near fatal mistake working the hydraulic system. An ominous message comes across the radio as the men head for homeports.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: On Deck: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Crawling with facts and bonus scenes: The Bering Sea captains rally after a fierce battle with typhoon Hagibis. Now they must step back up against the Russians even if it means war.

programme.desc: Josh and his crew get an opportunity to supply ahi and mahi to a local restaurant and hope Phil's notes will lead them to a big payday. It's their first chance to turn a profit but if they want to succeed, they must first learn the Hawaiian way.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Marvelous Mott Mott

programme.title: Black-ish: Wilds of Valley Glen
programme.desc: Dre must take Jack and Diane on a mandatory camping trip for school and hatches a plan for them to escape to a fancy hotel for some pampering.

programme.title: Black-ish: Waltz in a Minor
programme.desc: Dre's teenage cousin Kyra needs a place to stay and the Johnsons decide to take her in, but they have different approaches to helping her adjust to suburban life. Meanwhile, Jack and Diane try to vet Kyra on social media to get information on her.

programme.title: Black-ish: Black Like Us
programme.desc: Dre and Bow are furious after Diane isn't lit properly in her class photo. Diane doesn't want to make it a big deal, but they decide to talk to the principal about the need for sensitivity toward all complexions.

programme.title: Black-ish: Dreamgirls and Boys
programme.desc: Dre and Bow struggle with the changing times of identity politics and gender neutrality. Diane auditions for the school play and scores the male lead part, but her crush starts spending time with another girl.

programme.title: Black-ish: Son of a Pitch
programme.desc: Junior is working at Stevens & Lido as an intern and takes some time to find his footing; but when he offers an idea during a pitch meeting, Dre immediately puts him in his place.

programme.title: Black-ish: justakidfromcompton
programme.desc: Dre and Bow want to send Kyra to Valley Glen Prep, but after the school treats them like a charity case, they are infuriated. Meanwhile, Junior wants to get a job as Josh's assistant at Stevens and Lido.

programme.title: Black-ish: Enough Is Enough
programme.desc: After Kyra's estranged father, Perry, shows up and wants to bring Kyra home to Houston, Dre and Bow work to show him the amazing life they can provide for her. Meanwhile, the kids go on a mission to get her one last chili dog from Larry's.

programme.title: Black-ish: Each One, Teach One
programme.desc: Dre feels like he has made a difference with the diversity at Stevens & Lido as the head of the Urban Division, but when Junior tells him that Josh is his mentor, Dre flips out.

programme.title: Black-ish: Black History Month
programme.desc: Dre is upset after he learns that Jack and Diane are getting the same surface-level education about Black History Month that he got when he was growing up.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: The Finger
programme.desc: Catherine is ordered by a kidnapper to accompany a man who is to deliver $1 million in ransom to him or else he will kill the man's mistress.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Alter Boys
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate a murder suspect who is caught red handed burying the victims. Meanwhile, Catherine and Warrick must determine if the woman found dead in the hotel spa was the victim of negligence, foul play or natural causes.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Caged
programme.desc: After a book restorer is found dead and locked inside a cage, Grissom and Nick attempt to determine whether it is a case of suicide or homicide. Meanwhile, Catherine and Sara are sent to comb through the wreckage of a collision between a train and a SUV.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Slaves of Las Vegas
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine are forced to delve into Las Vegas' underground fetish scene when the body of an attractive woman is found naked in a sandbox. Meanwhile, Warrick and Sara are called to a crime scene to investigate a shooting.

programme.title: Movie: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: Rick and Evelyn return to save the world after their son accidentally resurrects an evil Chinese emperor.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Dreary Home Gets Bright Update
programme.desc: A baking aficionado and her husband want to convert their dark, oddly constructed home into a bright and welcoming space for them and their kids.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: From Craftsman to Creole Cottage
programme.desc: A couple who loves New Orleans-style architecture asks Dave and Jenny transform their classic Craftsman into a Creole cottage. The duo work to remodel each room with unique touches like antique doors, gas lanterns and an airy front porch.

programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a good lead on a 1500 sq. ft. house in Whittier, CA. The home is dirty and dated, with a large fireplace in the center that will cost a fortune to update. They struggle to find a happy medium between design cost and profitability.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Risky Business: Midcentury Money Pit
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a house in Fullerton, California, right across the street from Tarek's first flip. Before renovating, they have to deal with crumbling concrete, and they need to figure out the market for the house.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: A Pig in a Poke
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina spot a trust sale in Fullerton, California and make an offer on the house.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Freeway Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home for sale in a historic neighborhood of Anaheim, California. It's well-priced but will need a lot of renovation work to be sure.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Down to the Studs
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a 'for sale by owner' property in Whittier, California that would scare most buyers away, but they're not most buyers.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Narrow Margin Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted by their friend and fellow investor, Pete. He's already purchased a home in Anaheim, California and wants to bring Tarek and Christina in on what should be a quick flip for a modest profit.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: A New Kitchen for an Old Friend
programme.desc: Christina's lifelong friend, Cassie, is moving back to her childhood home in Anaheim Hills, California. The home has not been renovated in over 17 years, and she's hoping Christina can work her magic on the dated kitchen and dining area.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Master Suite Makeover
programme.desc: A couple's master suite is in desperate need of a makeover. Christina comes to the rescue, turning the dingy, dated bathroom and bedroom into a chic and functional space.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: A Colorful Kitchen Makeover
programme.desc: A couple that recently moved into their Tustin, California, home started working on cosmetic changes like paint and flooring, but they had to put the kitchen project on hold when their daughter was born. They need Christina to help update the space.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Tore Down From the Floor Down
programme.desc: A couple wants to update the master bedroom and bathroom in their Costa Mesa, California, home and need Christina's help to merge their tastes into a cohesive design. While she's a fan of rustic looks, he prefers modern, clean and contemporary.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Sweet Master Suite
programme.desc: A couple who has been steadily renovating their Huntington Beach home has only one room left to conquer. They hope Christina can turn their cramped, dark master suite into the room of their dreams.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Getting a New Kitchen Before Baby Number Two
programme.desc: A couple is in a rush to renovate their kitchen before the arrival of the second child, and hope Christina will help them figure out the perfect makeover for their growing family in time.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Killer Kitchen for Mom
programme.desc: A busy mom of three is looking for the ultimate kitchen. She wants Christina to give the dated space an open, beachy feel while still keeping it functional for her family.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Wedding Special
programme.desc: The house hunt begins after Christina and Ant decide to move in together. Christina wants something inland with a Cape Cod feel, while Ant prefers a modern space on the waterfront. The clock is ticking as they will be hosting a secret wedding.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: My Perfect Paradise
programme.desc: Christina has a new man and a new house, but she's got her work cut out for her with a newly blended family to entertain. After taking on an ambitious backyard remodel, Christina and Ant find they may have bitten off more than they can chew.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Firehouse Functional Kitchen
programme.desc: A family is anxious to turn their dark, closed off kitchen into an open concept living space with plenty of upgrades.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Pando Express
programme.desc: A recently married couple is blending both their family and style. While he made upgrades to the house years ago, she's ready to insert her own flavour so the space reflects both of their personalities and their new life together.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Counting Down to a Kitchen and a Baby
programme.desc: A couple expecting their first child takes on a kitchen renovation and hope to complete it before the baby arrives. She has a boho-chic style, and it doesn't mesh with his hopes for something clean and sleek.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Blowing Out the Walls
programme.desc: After living in their home for 17 years and saving up for the past 12, a couple is diving into a massive renovation to create their dream kitchen. Christina plans an open concept, but unexpected discoveries threaten her idea.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Out With An Original Bathroom

programme.title: Alone: Out Cold
programme.desc: The remaining competitors start to deal with starvation. One survivalist's body starts to give out as she competes to stay in the competition, while another continues to lose weight despite an abundance of food.

programme.title: Alone: The Ice Cometh
programme.desc: The contestants struggle to obtain resources as the weather gets colder. One survivalist continues losing weight at a deadly pace, while another continues to be harassed by predators, and another participant discovers the Arctic winter has just begun.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens in America
programme.desc: Strange rock carvings from 8,000 B. C., unexplained sightings in the new world and a frightening anomaly plaguing the American West are investigated.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Circles From the Sky
programme.desc: Crop circles have been making modern headlines since the 1960s, but their history can be traced back hundreds, if not thousands of years. The designs themselves often contain encrypted messages and complex equations.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Robots
programme.desc: In the 21st century, robots are being programmed to do everything from perform surgery on humans to explore other planets. Also, humanoid robots are rapidly reaching a level of sophistication that was thought to exist only in science fiction.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Forbidden Zones
programme.desc: Certain forbidden sites are often ground zero for chaos and the destruction of ancient artifacts and irreplaceable records detailing mankind's origins and history.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Reptilians
programme.desc: The Reptilian alien is a fixture of science-fiction, but ancient myths about reptilian creatures could provide evidence that they are more than just a pop-culture creation. Legends of serpent beings can be found on every continent.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Russia Declassified
programme.desc: Learn about a secret alliance hidden in plain sight and joint space missions with undisclosed agendas.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Next Humans
programme.desc: Transhumanists envision a future in which we become cyborgs, achieving far superior intelligence and the possibility of immortality. Ancient Astronaut theorists suggest superhuman beings have walked the Earth before.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Alien Mountain
programme.desc: A mysterious mountain in northern Italy has stood witness to strange sightings in the sky and unexplainable phenomena for hundreds of years.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Secrets of Stonehenge
programme.desc: A shocking DNA study released in 2018 reveals that the original builders of Stonehenge mysteriously vanished. Experts discuss if Stonehenge's mysterious 'bluestone circle' could have activated a portal that transported the culture back to the stars.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Mystery of Nan Madol
programme.desc: Giorgio Tsoukalos and David Childress explore the mysterious chain of manmade islets in Micronesia's Nan Madol.

programme.title: Bunk'd: O Sister, Where Art Thou?

programme.title: Snapped: Cynthia Alvarez
programme.desc: As Halloween approaches in southern California, a family of three mysteriously goes missing. During their search for answers, investigators unearth a haunting message that points to murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Blanche Taylor Moore
programme.desc: When a small town preacher is hospitalized with a mysterious illness, North Carolina police uncover a string of suspicious deaths all centered around a Burlington woman with a hidden dark side.

programme.title: Snapped: Lorraine Hunter
programme.desc: After a truck driver is found shot to death in the cab of his semi-truck, homicide detectives in California follow a trail of deceit to uncover a ruthless killer who will stop at nothing to walk free.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Jennifer Shanbrom and Matt Fletcher
programme.desc: A beloved police officer's murder will take years for his brothers in blue to solve, ultimately revealing a conspiracy born out of lust and greed.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Patricia Teeter & Steven Brown
programme.desc: A shocking double murder and kidnapping springs police into action to stop a pair of deadly lovers before they can kill again. A surviving victim recounts the harrowing ordeal.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Vanished
programme.desc: Young nursing student Michelle Le had disappeared. Something drew her out to her car. As her loved ones launched a very public effort to find Michelle, investigators began their own methodical search.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Connection
programme.desc: They were bright young women out for a little fun with their friends. Kenya Monge and Lydia Tillman didn't know each other but they would be forever related, both falling prey to a smooth-talking stranger with a terrifying secret.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Unimaginable
programme.desc: The case made national headlines: A toddler left in the car for seven hours while his dad was at work. Was this a heartbreaking accident? Police said it was murder. Could any parent ever do this on purpose?

programme.title: Dateline: Evil Intent
programme.desc: When a young woman fails to show up to work, her mother rushes to her home to try to find her. When she discovers begins an investigation that leads to a suspect no one imagined.

programme.title: Dateline: Final Curtain
programme.desc: A soon-to-be bride is caught in the middle of a twisted murder plot that has detectives questioning if she played a role in it. Exclusive interviews and reporting unfold the case that made national headlines.

programme.title: Dateline: The Mansion on Ocean Boulevard
programme.desc: Two tragic deaths occur within one week of each other in a wealthy city in California, leading families to wonder what happened inside a beachfront mansion.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Nightfall
programme.desc: After a young mom is found dead on the side of a country road, 40 miles from her Knoxville home, investigators scramble to figure out how she ended up there. Tucked away in her kitchen is a clue to unravelling the mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Last Dance
programme.desc: A beloved kindergarten teacher and mother of two finds a new lease on life after shedding hundreds of pounds. When she suddenly vanishes from her home, investigators uncover a disturbing connection.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in a Small Town
programme.desc: Her life ended in mystery on a dead-end road. A mother of three, she was beloved by her family and tight-knit community. For years the murder investigation went cold, however secrets have a way of eventually coming out.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Deed
programme.desc: It was a sprawling southern family farm run by a former church deacon and his wife, who would want the beloved couple dead. Police followed the clues into a family feud, exposing ugly secrets but unmasking the murderer would be more complicated.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Michelle Young was married to her college sweetheart and pregnant with their second child when she was murdered. In the search for her killer, detectives uncovered a marriage riddled with secrets but cracking this complicated case took years.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deep in the Woods
programme.desc: Kelli Bordeaux was just starting what she hoped to be a long career in the military, but fate had other plans. When she vanished, friends and family launched a frantic search, but it was stranger hell-bent on justice who uncovered the ugly truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Detour
programme.desc: Diane McIver was a successful businesswoman who enjoyed a lavish lifestyle with her husband. Then she was gone. It was a mystery riddled with privilege and power, but investigators needed to answer a crucial question: was this an accident or murder?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery at Ascot Estates

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery On Blood Mountain
programme.desc: It started with a frightening horror flick from the '80s. Then decades later, it was happening for real. Four people were dead and investigators believed they were chasing a serial killer.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Screaming Mummy

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Anarchy on Ireland's Alcatraz
programme.desc: The ruins of an abandoned prison are evidence of a chaotic riot that put the prisoners in charge. Special access to its burnt-out interior reveals how inmates took over Ireland's Alcatraz and why it is deserted today.
